description.canonical: Fires volleys of icy grenades that inflict a lingering chill on the blast zone.
description.display: 发射一连串冰冷的手榴弹，在爆炸区域留下持久的寒气。

description.canonical: Launches a volley of bomb darts that embed themselves in targets, exploding a short time later.
description.display: 发射一连串炸弹飞镖，嵌入目标中并在短时间后爆炸。

description.canonical: Launches a swarm of micro-missiles.
description.display: 发射密集的微型导弹。

description.canonical: Releases a burst of static electricity that can jump between foes, incapacitating them.
description.display: 释放出一阵静电，该静电可以在敌人之间跳跃，使他们失去战斗能力。

description.canonical: Charges up a powerful blast of ultra-heated plasma.
description.display: 可蓄能发射出强力爆发的极热电浆。

description.canonical: Hound melee attacks pierce hard with 冲击Impact and 穿刺Puncture Damage.
description.display: 猎犬近战攻击通过 冲击冲击和 穿刺穿刺伤害猛烈穿刺。

description.canonical: Hound melee attacks devastate with 冲击Impact and 切割Slash Damage.
description.display: 猎犬近战攻击通过 冲击冲击和 切割切割伤害进行毁灭。

description.canonical: Hound melee attacks eviscerate with 穿刺Puncture and 切割Slash Damage.
description.display: 猎犬近战攻击通过 穿刺穿刺和 切割切割伤害开膛剖腹。

description.canonical: Teshin's twin blades.
description.display: Teshin 的双侍刃。

description.canonical: Fires a small burst of lasers.
description.display: 点射一小束激光。

description.canonical: Allows the Helios Prime to violently disassemble and turn itself into a deadly projectile.
description.display: 使赫利俄斯 Prime 剧烈拆卸，并将自身变化为一颗致命的发射体。

description.canonical: Standard issue weaponry signature to Dethcube.
description.display: 死亡魔方标准武器

description.canonical: Freeze targets in their tracks with this sentinel mounted ice-beam.
description.display: 使用守护装有的冰冷光束将目标在行动路线上冻结。

description.canonical: A laser rifle developed by reverse-engineering Corpus technology.
description.display: 通过 Corpus 科技逆向工程开发出来的一种激光步枪。

description.canonical: Shade Prime’s signature weapon fires laser bursts.
description.display: 阴影 Prime 的标志性武器会发射激光束。

description.canonical: Signature default weapon of Dethcube Prime.
description.display: 死亡魔方 Prime 的标志性武器。

description.canonical: A Prime Laser Rifle.
description.display: 一把激光步枪 Prime。

description.canonical: Standard issue weapon for Carrier Prime Sentinel. Fires shotgun rounds.
description.display: 搬运者 PRIME的标准武器，使用霰弹枪子弹。

description.canonical: Fires a small burst of lasers.
description.display: 点射一小束激光。

description.canonical: Standard issue weapon for Djinn Sentinel. Fires Toxin projectiles that embed into enemies and continuously deal damage for 3 seconds.
description.display: 引灵守护的标准武器。发射 毒素投射物，嵌入敌人体内并持续造成伤害，持续 3 秒。

description.canonical: Standard issue sniper rifle for Diriga.
description.display: 电气浮囊的标准狙击枪。

description.canonical: Causes the Helios Sentinel to attack enemy targets using pieces of itself.
description.display: 赫利俄斯用自己身上的部件攻击目标敌人。

description.canonical: The icy signature weapon of Nautilus Prime.
description.display: 鹦鹉螺 Prime 的标志性冰冻武器。

description.canonical: Designed as the perfect mate for Nautilus, this Sentinel weapon projects an icy beam at nearby targets.
description.display: 作为鹦鹉螺的完美同伴，这件守护武器可向附近的目标投射冰冻光束。

description.canonical: Standard issue weapon for Carrier Sentinel. Fires shotgun rounds.
description.display: 搬运者守护的标准武器，使用霰弹枪子弹。

description.canonical: The dual flaming fang-blades of the Archon Amar. Has a unique Neutral Combo that blasts out four short-range fireballs.
description.display: 执刑官欺谋狼主的烈焰双刃。其独特的近战组合可以发射四个短程火球。

description.canonical: Archon Boreal’s signature trident. Thrust Korumm into the ground with a Tactical Combo and then rip it out in a shower of electricity.
description.display: 执刑官诡文枭主的标志性三叉戟。战术组合可以将雷霆暴君插入地面，并在拔出时造成电击。

description.canonical: Archon Nira’s spine-shattering whip. Has a unique Tactical Combo that whips out a wide wave of energy with each stroke.
description.display: 执刑官混沌蛇主的刺骨长鞭。其独特的战术组合每次抽击时都会掀起巨大的能量波。

description.canonical: Obtain enlightenment with this massive hammer that performs a Codex scan on each fatal strike. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.
description.display: 用这把重型战锤获得启示，它可以在每次毁灭性的攻击时进行资料库扫描。扫描需要携带一个资料库扫描器且有可用的扫描次数。

description.canonical: Creates miniature gravitational singularities that can be used for scientific study or self-defense.
description.display: 能制造出微型的重力奇异点，可用于科学研究或自我防卫。

description.canonical: The Acrid fires an acidic-infused needle.
description.display: 阿克里德可以射出注满强酸的刺针。

description.canonical: Torid lobs a toxic payload.
description.display: 托里德能抛射出剧毒榴弹。

description.canonical: Ignis produces a stream of intense heat.
description.display: 伊格尼斯能产生一股强烈的热浪。

description.canonical: A blood-red variant of this destructive flamethrower.
description.display: 这款破坏性火焰喷射器的血红变体。

description.canonical: Ogris fires detonite-infused casings.
description.display: 食人女魔能发射满载易爆物的炮弹。

description.canonical: The SUPRA is a heavy laser gun with a short wind up time.
description.display: 苏普拉是把重型激光枪，可在很短的时间内启动。

description.canonical: While its intended design is for deep space construction, the concentrated laser beam of the Spectra is highly effective against organic and synthetic enemies.
description.display: 虽然它原本设计给太空中的工程师，光谱切割器的集中激光对有机和合成敌人也非常有效。

description.canonical: Laser Rifle with Corpus safe-guards removed.
description.display: 一把已卸除了 Corpus 安全装置的激光步枪。

description.canonical: A customized version of the Dera, featuring a metallic finish and Lotus decal.
description.display: 这把是定制化版本的德拉步枪，拥有着金属质感及 Lotus 的徽记。

description.canonical: The Prova is a Melee Weapon that delivers a high-intensity shock to its target.
description.display: 普罗沃是一把能对目标造成强大电击伤害的近战武器。

description.canonical: The Dera is a repeater that fires super-heated plasma.
description.display: 德拉是一把射出高热电浆的连发步枪。

description.canonical: The Lanka fires a high velocity projectile through magnetic induction.
description.display: 兰卡使用电磁加速射出高速子弹。

description.canonical: A customized version of the vicious Prova, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.
description.display: 这是凶恶的普罗沃的定制化版本，拥有金属质感及莲花徽记。

description.canonical: Custom variant of a Corpus classic. Staggering blasts now ricochet and have greater range at the cost of a slower fire and reload speed. Surviving enemies are consumed with radiation.
description.display: Corpus 经典武器的特制变体。惊人的爆炸会反弹且拥有更高的射程，但代价是更低的射速和装填速度。幸存下来的敌人会被辐射耗尽生命。

description.canonical: The expert engineers in Parvos Granum’s division have optimized the Ferrox’s lethal power.
description.display: 帕尔沃斯·格拉努部门的专业工程师优化了铁晶磁轨炮的杀伤力。

description.canonical: Sister-modified Flux Rifle with increased fire rate and range. Recharge has been replaced with ammo clips to accommodate greater power needs.
description.display: 由姐妹们改装过的通量步枪提升了射速和射程。充电系统已被弹匣取代以适应更高的电量消耗。

description.canonical: Advances in microelectronics have improved a Corpus classic. Tenet Glaxion’s photon beam strikes up to four enemies at once. It also boasts superior Damage, Critical Chance, and Status Chance.
description.display: 微电子技术的进步改进了 Corpus 的经典武器。信条·冷冻光束步枪的光子束最多可以同时攻击四个敌人。它还拥有较高的伤害、暴击几率和触发几率。

description.canonical: Once a mining tool adapted for military purposes, Parvosian engineering has enhanced the Quanta's lethality even further.
description.display: 曾经的采矿工具为了军事用途而改造，帕尔沃斯式的工程技术进一步增强了量子切割器的杀伤力。

description.canonical: Parvosian upgrade of the classic Tetra. Slower fire rate but with a larger magazine. Can now alt-fire entire clip as a large burst radius grenade launcher.
description.display: 经典特拉的帕尔沃斯式升级版。射速较慢但拥有更大的弹匣。次要射击可以将整个弹匣作为高爆炸范围的榴弹发射出去。

description.canonical: This reengineered Cycron features a refracting energy disc that can split off the main target, hitting up to 2 additional nearby targets.
description.display: 这款重新设计的循环离子枪拥有一个折射能量盘，光束射击可以从主要目标上分离，最多击中附近的两个额外目标。

description.canonical: Parvos Granum's engineers have made this already ferocious hand cannon even more deadly with the addition of an alternate fire mode that empties an entire clip in one devastating burst.
description.display: 帕尔沃斯·格拉努的工程师们为这把已经十分凶猛的手炮增加了一种新的射击模式，在一次毁灭性的爆发中清空整个弹匣，使这把武器更加致命。

description.canonical: Alternate fire on this reengineered Plinx fires a projectile that pulls enemies close and then explodes. Its cooldown increases after the explosion to accommodate battery power demands.
description.display: 这把重新设计的漫射者可以使用次要射击发射一枚投射物将敌人拉近然后爆炸。爆炸后冷却时间会增加以满足电池的电量需求。

description.canonical:
Bolts from this Corpus bow deliver a one-two punch of an icy pulse, followed by a conventional explosion. Excess ammo picked up for other weapons will be converted into charges for the Lenz. 

Warning: Safety-protocols do not exist on this prototype.
description.display:
从这把 Corpus 弓箭中射出的箭矢将会放出极寒脉冲，紧接产生常规爆炸。额外拾取的其他武器弹药将会转化为楞次弓的电荷。

警告：此原型机未使用安全协议。

description.canonical: The explosive potential of the Lenz, enhanced with Prisma crystals.
description.display: 通过棱晶强化，楞次弓的爆炸潜力得以发掘。

description.canonical: The Amprex rifle fires a continuous beam of high voltage electricity that arcs among nearby enemies. This weapon excels at Crowd Control.
description.display: 安培克斯步枪可持续发射致命电光束并在敌人中形成电弧。这件武器在群体控制方面很优秀。

description.canonical: Drawing from its huge quad-chambered magazine, the Tetra is capable of unleashing a sustained barrage of lethal energy bolts.
description.display: 借由它巨大的四腔弹匣，特拉能持续发射由能量弹形成的致命弹幕。

description.canonical: When bathed in Void energy and prisma crystal, the simple Tetra becomes a beacon of style and intimidation.
description.display: 在浸泡过虚空能量与棱晶后，这把单纯的特拉能量步枪成为了威吓与风格的指标。

description.canonical: Bring negotiations to an instant conclusion with this Corpus assault rifle. Switch effortlessly between charged explosive shots and rapid-fire electrical assault mode.
description.display: 使用这支 Corpus 突击步枪让谈判立即结束。可以在充能爆炸狙击和速射电子突击模式之间自由切换。

description.canonical: Once charged this Corpus laser cannon dispatches a devastating blast of light energy.
description.display: 一旦这挺 Corpus 激光炮充能完毕，便能释放出毁灭性的光能爆炸。

description.canonical: With a precision crafted lens, this customized Opticor achieves a level of performance previously thought impossible.
description.display: 装有精密制作的透镜，这把定制化版本的奥堤克光子枪达到了以前认为不可能有的性能水平。

description.canonical: This discreet rocket launcher is equally at home in a board meeting or on a casual outing. Aimed rockets are wire-guided for greater accuracy, but travel more slowly. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the weapon when holstered.
description.display: 这款朴素的火箭发射器在董事会会议或休闲郊游时同样适用。瞄准发射的火箭是线导的，精确度更高，但飞行速度更慢。配备了获得专利批准的格拉努公文包系统，收起时自动装填。

description.canonical: Fires a photon beam that halts molecular vibrations, causing instant and painful freezing.
description.display: 发射出一道能暂停分子振动的光子束，造成痛苦的瞬间冻结。

description.canonical: A cutting-edge, halogen-cooled electron accelerator capable of snap-freezing a target in moments.
description.display: 一把用尖端技术打造的卤素冷却电子加速器，能够瞬间将目标冷冻起来。

description.canonical: Nail them to the wall! The Stahlta automatic rifle propels hardened steel rods at high speed, while a charged fire mode fuses a number of volatile rods together for a large radioactive explosion.
description.display: 将敌人钉在墙上！这件钢刃自动步枪把硬化钢棒推进到高速状态，而蓄力射击模式会将大量不稳定的钢棒融合在一起，产生巨大的放射性爆炸。

description.canonical: Corpus ingenuity leveraging Tau-tech to create a high-capacity bi-modal sniper weapon of terrifying capability. Zoom in to reduce recoil and add punch through. Zoom again to fire a bursting viral round, but with a lower rate of fire. Komorex features built-in ammo conversion.
description.display: Corpus 独具匠心地利用 Tau 技术创造了一把可怕的大弹匣容量狙击枪。变焦可减少后坐力并增加穿透力。再次变焦可发射爆炸的病毒子弹，但射速降低。猛毒有自带的弹药转换。

description.canonical: A weapon that builds charge the more it kills. Hit capacity then release for an obliterating discharge of power.
description.display: 一把借由击杀敌人来充能的武器。蓄满后可以释放出毁灭性的力量。

description.canonical: Feel the kick of this Corpus shotgun as it shatters a high-yield crystal into anyone and anything standing in your way.
description.display: 当这把 Corpus 霰弹枪将高产水晶轰入阻挡在你前方的任何人或物时，请细细品味其后坐力。

description.canonical: This weapon was designed to assist with the excavation of mineral deposits from large asteroids, but has been adapted for military purposes.
description.display: 这个武器原本是设计用来在大型小行星上协助挖掘矿物，但现在已更改为应用于军事用途上。

description.canonical: A customized version of the Quanta, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.
description.display: 这把是定制化版本的量子切割器，拥有着金属质感及 Lotus 的徽记。

description.canonical: Stagger targets with blasts from this Corpus engineered plasma shotgun. Surviving enemies are consumed with radiation.
description.display: 用这把 Corpus 设计的等离子霰弹枪来击倒你的目标。幸存下来的敌人会被辐射耗尽生命。

description.canonical: When its twin-lasers converge on a target a circuit is created, frying the subject.
description.display: 当双道激光汇聚在目标上时，便会产生回路，将敌人给炸熟。

description.canonical: Enveloped in deep red composite enamel, this Penta variant features a higher fire-rate and over-sized magazine.
description.display: 由深红色复合珐琅包络的潘塔变体，具有更高的射速和超大容量的弹匣。

description.canonical: The Penta Launcher fires up to five grenades that can be remotely triggered at just the right moment.
description.display: 潘塔发射器最多可发射五发榴弹，并在最适当的时候进行远距离引爆。

description.canonical: A customized version of the powerful Supra, featuring a metallic finish and Lotus decal.
description.display: 强力苏普拉的定制版本，拥有着金属质感及 Lotus 的徽记。

description.canonical: Discharge a rail of ionized death or throw the Ferrox like a spear and create a localized field of attraction no enemy can escape from.
description.display: 释放一道电离的死光，或掷出铁晶磁轨炮以产生一个敌人无法逃脱的局部吸引力场。

description.canonical: The sleek lines of the Granum Attaché case conceal an infinitely sharp two-handed blade. Blocked attacks have a chance to increase the blocking angle. Note: The Granum Attaché system pauses the combo timer when holstered.
description.display: 格拉努公文包的流畅线条下隐藏着削铁如泥的双持利刃。格挡攻击有几率增加格挡角度。配备了获得专利批准的格拉努公文包系统，收起时暂停连击倒计时。

description.canonical: On Heavy Slide Attack, this Corpus scythe launches a spinning energy disk that ricochets throughout the battlefield. Its lifetime is derived from the size of the Combo Counter. Note: The Granum Attaché system pauses the combo timer when holstered.
description.display: 滑行重击时，这把 Corpus 镰刀会发射一个旋转的能量盘在战场上弹跳。能量盘的持续时间由近战连击数决定。注意：格拉努公文包系统会在武器收起时暂停连击倒计时。

description.canonical: Prisma crystals glisten in these electrified tonfas.
description.display: 棱晶在这对带电的拐刃上闪闪发光。

description.canonical: Bring the enemy to its knees with these twin electrified tonfas.
description.display: 用这对带电的双子拐刃使你的敌人跪地求饶。

description.canonical: This unsophisticated Corpus survival tool does what it was designed for: hacking and splitting whatever it strikes.
description.display: 这把简易的 Corpus 生存工具履行了它的设计目标：砍杀和分裂任何攻击对象。

description.canonical: An obscure glaive weapon of Corpus provenance, intrinsically linked to Specter technology. The Xoris strikes rapidly and with great devastation. It is capable of chaining combos infinitely.
description.display: 一件来源于 Corpus 且鲜为人知的战刃武器，与魅影技术有内在联系。「驱魔之刃」可以迅速进行打击，并拥有显著的破坏力。此外它可以无限进行连击。

description.canonical: Carve through enemies with surgical precision using this Corpus-tech glaive.
description.display: 用这把 Corpus 科技的战刃以手术般的精确性剖开敌人。

description.canonical: A short-blade melee weapon with an ace up its sleeve. Send nearby enemies flying with a powerful short-range shockwave.
description.display: 一件暗藏玄机的短刃近战武器。通过强大的短程冲击波来击飞附近的敌人。

description.canonical: Each successive kill from this massive electron hammer builds an electron charge that is unleashed on slam attacks.
description.display: 这柄巨型电子重锤的每一次连续击杀都会积累一重电荷，可以通过震地攻击将其释放出来。

description.canonical: The Obex system multiplies the kinetic energy of a Tenno's kicks and punches, delivering devastating blows to any target.
description.display: 奥比克斯战斗系统能强化 Tenno 的近身肉搏能力，给予目标致命伤害。

description.canonical: Dazzle, distract and destroy with these sparring weapons of impossibly hard prisma crystal.
description.display: 用这件由无比坚硬的棱晶所打造的搏击武器，打出令人眼花缭乱的招式，进而摧毁敌人。

description.canonical: Developed as an energy saw to scrap obsolete ships, this tool was quickly banned when rebels in the Sedna region discovered it also made an excellent weapon.
description.display: 能源锯的开发目的原是用以报废淘汰船只，但在赛德娜地区的反抗份子发现它也能用来作为优良的武器使用时，它很快就被禁止使用。

description.canonical: Drive the agenda with this massive impact hammer. Heavy attacks launch devastating energy disks.
description.display: 用这把重型冲击锤推动议程。重击会发射毁灭性的能量盘。

description.canonical: Half taser, half whip. The Corpus Lecta delivers a deadly shock to anything it touches.
description.display: 一半电击器一半鞭子。这条 Corpus 的勒克塔会对接触到的任何东西发出致命电击。

description.canonical: Shock and maim with this heavyweight retractable whip.
description.display: 使用这把重型伸缩鞭施以电击与残害。

description.canonical: The sleek lines of the Detron conceal its ferocious nature. The hand cannon's semi-automatic action takes down enemies with speed and efficiency.
description.display: 德特昂的流线型线条掩饰其凶残本性，这把半自动手枪是快速并有效率地击倒敌人。

description.canonical: Compact and deadly, the Cestra discharges bolts of energy at an increasingly rapid rate.
description.display: 小巧而致命的锡斯特，以越来越快的射速释放能量弹。

description.canonical: Wield two Cestras to unleash a dual torrent of high energy bolts.
description.display: 双手各持一把锡斯特释放出双流高能量弹幕。

description.canonical: A special-order Corpus cutting tool for master crafters only. Features distinctive azurite plating and a focusing crystal of precision clarity and cut.
description.display: 一把特殊订制的 Corpus 切割工具，只适用于大师级工匠。具有独特的蓝铜色电镀外观和用于精准清澈化以及切割的聚焦水晶。

description.canonical: Blasts targets with a massive wave of sonic energy. Results reported to be: 'Very Satisfying'.
description.display: 以巨大的声波能量震飞目标。使用报告的结果是：非常爽。

description.canonical: Itemize and execute with this pair of auto-lock-on, homing-projectile pistols. Shoot from-hip for a more conventional pistol experience. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the pistols when holstered.
description.display: 用这对自动锁定追踪目标的双枪将敌人逐个击破。腰射模式与传统手枪无异。配备了获得专利批准的格拉努公文包系统，收起时自动装填。

description.canonical: Forgo ammunition with the regenerating energy disc in this plasma throwing pistol.
description.display: 用这把装有能量恢复圆盘的等离子体发射手枪摆脱弹药的限制。

description.canonical: Send a massive charge of potential energy hurling toward unfortunate targets.
description.display: 将强大的静电势能射向不幸的敌人。

description.canonical: Capable of firing multiple rockets at once, the Angstrum is a handheld instrument of destruction.
description.display: 能够同时发射若干火箭的安格斯壮是一个手持的毁灭工具。

description.canonical: Imbued with the finest Prisma crystal, this refined Angstrum features boosted charge and reload speeds.
description.display: 灌注了最出色的棱晶，这款经过精制后的安格斯壮的特点是具有更快的蓄力和装填速度。

description.canonical: Dominate rivals with this pistol’s lightning fast rail-slugs. Head-shots speed up reload.
description.display: 用这把手枪快如闪电的弹道压制对手。爆头可加快装填速度。

description.canonical: Sentient tech merges with Corpus design to deliver this lethal sidearm. Fully automatic, it fires ricocheting, homing projectiles that release small clouds of 毒气Gas on impact. Alt-fire to release the entire magazine without homing as a single burst.
description.display: Sentient 科技与 Corpus 设计的结合，发展出这款致命的次要武器。该武器为全自动，可射出跳飞式、自动导引的弹幕，子弹在撞击时会释放出小一股 毒气毒气。次要射击为可在单次射击中释放剩余的弹药。

description.canonical: A weapon that reaches for its next victim even as it kills. With each takedown, this pistol spawns an energy tendril that reaches for a nearby target.
description.display: 在击杀同时便已准备好对下一名受害者伸出魔爪的一种武器。每次击杀，这把手枪会生成能量卷须伸向邻近目标。

description.canonical: Cultivate a meaningful relationship with this deceptively simple battery-powered pistol. The Plinx rewards attention and investment from the wise.
description.display: 与这把看似朴素的电池手枪培养出深厚的情感。漫射者最能回馈来自智者的关注与投资。

description.canonical: This scoped pistol analyzes strikes, learning how to damage its targets most effectively. Achieve maximum damage output after five successive hits.
description.display: 这把带有瞄准镜的手枪会分析着弹，获悉如何更有效的对目标造成伤害。在连续成功命中五次后会达到最大的伤害输出。

description.canonical: This Grineer bow delivers vengeance in the form of clusterbomb-tipped arrows that can be detonated mid-air or on impact. Low quiver capacity, arrows are recovered singly.
description.display: 这把 Grineer 弓箭能射出尖端配有集束炸弹的复仇箭矢，可以在空中或遇到冲击时引爆。低箭袋容量，箭矢逐个恢复。

description.canonical: Designed as a pair, these Grineer sidearms fire projectiles at a slower rate but with greater force and accuracy.
description.display: 这把 Grineer 随身武器被设计成一对，虽然开火速度较慢，但有更强大的火力和准确性。

description.canonical: A full-auto pistol known as the most compact and lightweight weapon of the Grineer arsenal. Though it has a small Magazine Capacity, the Viper has a very high Fire Rate and ultra-fast reload times thanks to a simplified magazine design.
description.display: Grineer 军械库中小巧轻便的代名词。蝰蛇是一把弹匣容量细小的全自动手枪，其精简化的弹匣为其带来高射速及惊人的重新装填速度。

description.canonical: The Kraken is a heavy pistol of Grineer design that fires two quick shots with a single pull of the trigger. Skilled marksmen will appreciate the value in this deadly accurate weapon.
description.display: 北海巨妖是一把由 Grineer 设计、手感沉重的手枪，单扣扳机可迅速击出两连发射击。熟练的神枪手一定懂得这把致命精准武器的价值。

description.canonical: Captain Vor's prized Orokin-Grineer hybrid pistol has an average rate of fire, but it has high damage and superior zoom capabilities.
description.display: 奥罗金-Grineer 复合式手枪是沃尔上尉最重要的手枪，虽只有一般射速，但具有高杀伤力和卓越的狙击能力。

description.canonical: Sweep aside hordes of enemies with flaming fury of this powerful, automatic, grenade launching archgun.
description.display: 用这款全自动曲翼榴弹发射器的怒火来扫荡大群敌人。

description.canonical: Reconfigured for maximum lethality, the Kuva Grattler still shatters targets with explosive shells, but now reaches maximum fire-rate instantaneously.
description.display: 重新调配以获得最大杀伤力，赤毒葛拉特勒仍使用爆裂弹来粉碎目标，但现在可以瞬间达到最高射速。

description.canonical: The Kuva Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room that do not slow down. Larger Magazine Capacity and Reload Speed. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.
description.display: 这款改造版龙骑兵破片炮可击发出会四处弹射且不会减速的高热弹片。它拥有更大的弹匣容量和更快的装填速度。能以散射或压缩集中的方式进行射击。

description.canonical: Forged at the behest of the Worm Queen herself, this already powerful shotgun now has the additional ability to fire from all four barrels simultaneously.
description.display: 蠕虫女皇亲自下令锻造这把本就十分强大的霰弹枪，拥有额外功能可以同时从全部四个枪管开火。

description.canonical: This powerful Grineer burst rifle has been retrofitted to add semi-automatic and automatic fire modes.
description.display: 这款强大的 Grineer 连射步枪经过改装，增加了半自动和全自动开火模式。

description.canonical: The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. It has greater reload speed, lower recoil and greater accuracy than the standard-issue Karak rifle.
description.display: 某位可怕的赤毒玄骸所使用的改装武器。相比于原版卡拉克步枪，它拥有更快的装填速度、更低的后座力以及更高的精准度。

description.canonical: The Kuva Kohm variant has a higher fire rate than the original. For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kuva Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.
description.display: 这把赤毒寇恩热能枪变体拥有比原版更高的射速。赤毒寇恩热能枪在每一次高速连续的射击时都会额外击发出一发能量弹，使其更具杀伤力。

description.canonical: The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. Unlike the basic version the Kuva Ogris fires detonite-infused casings semi-automatically, from a smaller magazine, while dealing greater damage per shot.
description.display: 某位可怕的赤毒玄骸所使用的改装武器。与原版不同，它拥有更小的弹匣，能以半自动的方式发射满载易爆物的炮弹，同时每一发能造成更多伤害。

description.canonical: Unlike a standard Quartakk this Kuva Lich variant fires automatically from the hip while retaining its signature feature when aimed: annihilating targets with four simultaneous shots.
description.display: 与原版夸塔克不同，这种赤毒玄骸夸塔克变体能从腰际全自动开火射击，同时保持了瞄准时的特点：用 4 发同步射击来消灭目标。

description.canonical: The Kuva Sobek's exceptional Reload Speed, Critical Chance, and Status Chance make it a natural fit for the Kuva Lich's dominant spirit.
description.display: 赤毒·鳄神出色的装填速度、暴击几率和触发几率，与赤毒玄骸的霸道风格高度契合。

description.canonical: This Lich-variant grenade launcher hurls mayhem and destruction with an increased Reload Speed.
description.display: 这种榴弹发射器玄骸变体拥有更快的装填速度，可以对敌人猛烈射出暴乱与破坏。

description.canonical: An even stronger Zarr cannon to meet the demands of Kuva Liches. With stronger explosive barrages, and long-range flak shots.
description.display: 一把更强大的沙皇火炮，满足了赤毒玄骸的需求。拥有更强的爆裂弹幕和更远距离的高射炮弹。

description.canonical: The addition of Kuva has forged the savage Ghoulsaw into an even more brutal weapon, allowing for faster attacks.
description.display: 赤毒将尸鬼电锯锻造成了更野蛮的武器，可以进行更快的攻击。

description.canonical: This Lich-variant semi-automatic hand cannon delivers a lot of punch in a small package. Higher fire rate, magazine capacity and reload speed.
description.display: 这把玄骸变体的半自动手枪，小型的枪身中却拥有强大的冲击力。它拥有更高的射速、更大的弹匣容量以及更快的装填速度

description.canonical: A custom variant that fires three quick shots with a single pull of the trigger, or can alt-fire burst the remainder of its magazine. Higher Fire Rate, Magazine Capacity and Reload Speed.
description.display: 一种北海巨妖的改装变体，单扣扳机可迅速击出三连发射击，或者可通过次要射击来进行点射。它拥有更高的射速、更大的弹匣容量以及更快的装填速度

description.canonical: A highly-optimized Nukor that allows for the weapon’s microwave field to hit up to two additional targets.
description.display: 一把高度优化的努寇微波枪，可以通过其微波场击中最多两个额外目标。

description.canonical: This variant pistol has higher fire rate and magazine capacity. Superior zoom capabilities plus projectiles have a small Corrosive burst.
description.display: 这把变体手枪拥有更高的射速、弹匣容量以及变焦倍率。此外，它射出的子弹还会产生小范围腐蚀爆炸效果。

description.canonical: Double-fist rapid-fire bursts of pain with these dual-wield variants of the Grineer submachine gun. Higher Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity.
description.display: 用这把 Grineer 冲锋枪双持变体的爆发速射特性来产生双倍的苦痛。它拥有更高的射速和更大的弹匣容量。

description.canonical: A powerful mid-range rifle used by Grineer shock troops, the Hind fires in five round bursts.
description.display: 由 Grineer 突击部队使用的强力中阶步枪，雌鹿一次射击就是五连发。

description.canonical: Equipped with a huge Magazine and impressive Fire Rate, the Grakata is the preferred weapon of Grineer Lancers.
description.display: 装备了巨大弹匣，拥有非凡的射速。葛拉卡达是 Grineer 枪兵的首选。

description.canonical: When one Grakata isn't enough, bring another for extra firepower.
description.display: 一把葛拉卡达手枪不敷需求时，不妨再带上一把享受额外的火力吧。

description.canonical: The Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.
description.display: 龙骑兵破片炮可击发出会四处弹射的高热弹片。能以散射或压缩集中的方式进行射击。

description.canonical: With pinpoint accuracy, the Grinlok lever-action repeating rifle can easily find the soft spot on any target.
description.display: 凭借极高的精确度，葛恩火枪这把杠杆作用连发步枪可以轻而易举地找到任何目标的弱点。

description.canonical: Prisma-crystal enhancement creates here a prestige instrument; a weapon capable of taking life at astonishing range with but a single pull of its exquisitely-tooled trigger.
description.display: 棱晶的强化铸造了一个名贵的器械；一把能够在意想不到的范围内夺走生命的武器，并且只需要扣一次其精确好使的扳机。

description.canonical: Solid, dependable and deadly. The Karak is a standard issue rifle in many Grineer platoons.
description.display: 结实、可靠又致命。卡拉克是很多Grineer小队的一把标准配置步枪。

description.canonical: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling.
description.display: 有别于 Grineer 制式的突击步枪，卡拉克·亡魂有着独一无二的风格。

description.canonical: The Miter launches high velocity saw blades, tearing apart anyone unfortunate enough to be in their path.
description.display: 米特尔发射高速锯片，撕裂任何不幸在其路径上的人。

description.canonical: Built by the Grineer for their elite troopers, the Vulkar is a devastating distance weapon. In the right hands it is capable of taking down targets long before they get into attack range.
description.display: Grineer 为其精锐部队制造，金工火神是一把毁灭性的远程兵器。在正确的使用者手中它能在目标进入攻击距离之前将其迅速放倒。

description.canonical: A blood-red variant of this devastating sniper rifle.
description.display: 一把有着血红色装饰且杀伤力极大的狙击步枪。

description.canonical: Unload a barrage of explosives or a huge shot of flak from this cannon’s enormous barrel.
description.display: 从这具火炮的巨型炮管可以倾泻出爆裂的弹幕或者一枚大型的高射炮弹。

description.canonical: Launch super-heated slugs at individual foes, or hurl the entire weapon and ignite groups of enemies in a flash inferno.
description.display: 对单个敌人发射极热的子弹。或者将整个武器掷出并在地狱火光中点燃成群的敌人。

description.canonical: Annihilate targets with four simultaneous shots from this high-caliber Grineer rifle.
description.display: 用这把大口径的 Grineer 步枪的 4 发同步射击来消灭目标。

description.canonical: Mark your targets and unleash a barrage of bullets, the Buzlok's homing rounds always find the enemy. Marked targets are more likely to take critical hits.
description.display: 标记目标，并射出密集的弹幕，巴兹火枪的制导子弹永远能够找到敌人。被标记的敌人更容易遭到暴击。

description.canonical: Hurl mayhem and destruction with this Grineer grenade launcher.
description.display: 以这把 Grineer 榴弹发射器对敌人猛烈射出暴乱与破坏。

description.canonical: Spike enemies to the wall or reel them in with this burst harpoon gun.
description.display: 以这把爆裂鱼叉枪卷起敌人，或将他们钉在墙上。

description.canonical: Detonate heads with this slow-firing rifle that rewards precision.
description.display: 用这款需要精确瞄准的低射速步枪来打爆敌人的头颅。

description.canonical: Long before clone-rot set in, elite Grineer Commanders protected the surviving Orokin from rebelling Warframes with these formidable rifles. When Gotva Prime inflicts a Status Effect, its next shot has a chance to be a Super Critical hit.
description.display: 早在克隆基因衰变之前，精英 Grineer 指挥官就用这把强大的步枪从战甲的叛乱中保护幸存的奥罗金人。当骨葬 Prime 造成异常状态时，下一次射击有机会造成超级暴击。

description.canonical: For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.
description.display: 寇恩热能枪在每一次高速连续的射击时都会额外击发出一发能量弹，使其更具杀伤力。

description.canonical: Pick off targets by highlighting distant enemies using this Grineer rifle's advanced laser sighting system. Deadly in both single fire and automatic modes.
description.display: 利用这把 Grineer 步枪的先进激光瞄准系统高亮敌人，将他们逐一射杀。单发和全自动模式都非常致命。

description.canonical: Adorned with void hardened prisma crystal, this Gorgon variant is prized for its beauty and enhanced mechanics.
description.display: 装饰了虚空的硬化棱晶，使这把蛇发女妖因她的美丽与增强的机能变得更具价值。

description.canonical: The Gorgon Wraith is a powerful variant of its precursor that features unique styling.
description.display: 蛇发女妖·亡魂是其前身的强大变体，以它独特的风格为特色。

description.canonical: Motorized saw claw weapon.
description.display: 机动型巨爪武器。

description.canonical: Built for close combat, the Sheev's plasma blade slices through flesh and armor with equal ease.
description.display: 专为近身战斗设计，希芙的等离子刀刃能轻而易举切开肉体与护甲。

description.canonical: Slice through mobs of unruly enemies with this fierce halberd; the signature weapon of the Kuva Guardians.
description.display: 用这柄凶猛的长戟割开群魔乱舞的敌人；这是赤毒守卫者标志性的武器。

description.canonical: Deliver crushing blows with this Grineer built, jet powered mace.
description.display: Grineer 所制造的喷射动力锤能造成粉碎性的打击。

description.canonical: Butcher your foes with brutal blades in each hand.
description.display: 双持野蛮刀刃来屠宰你的敌人。

description.canonical: A ferocious Melee Weapon crafted by the Grineer and carried by their elite melee forces.
description.display: Grineer 制造的一把凶猛近战兵器，多数由精锐力量携带。

description.canonical: Blades of energized prisma crystal make these ornamental cleavers cut as sharply as they look.
description.display: 这双经过装饰的刀刃充满了棱晶的能量，使得这副双刀的切砍如同它的外表一般锐利。

description.canonical: The addition of Prisma Crystal allows this otherwise barbaric weapon to elegantly hack through any foe.
description.display: 这把原本野蛮的武器在融入棱晶后能优雅的斩杀任何敌人。

description.canonical: A different take on a familiar combat knife, the Machete Wraith features unique styling.
description.display: 熟悉的大砍刀配上不一样的造型，马谢特砍刀·亡魂以它的独特设计风格作标榜。

description.canonical: Tyl Regor's custom axe and shield are how he likes to eliminate ‘frustrations'.
description.display: 这对特制的战斧与盾牌正是泰尔·雷工用来消除"阻碍"的方式。

description.canonical: A multi-bladed whip that is adept at flaying skin from bone. In extreme cases, disobedient Grineer are sentenced to death by Atterax.
description.display: 擅长将皮肤从骨头上剥下的多刃鞭。在极端情况下，不听话的 Grineer 可以用阿特拉克斯判处死刑。

description.canonical: This jet powered Grineer throwing mace always comes back to its master and is even capable of disarming targets.
description.display: 这个Grineer 喷射动力飞锤，其冲击足以解除被击中者的武装，且投掷后总是能回到使用者手上。

description.canonical: A different take on the throwing mace, the Halikar Wraith features unique styling.
description.display: 有别于回力飞锤，哈利卡亡魂有着独一无二的风格。

description.canonical: These nasty, little hatchets slice through steel as if it were flesh.
description.display: 这对棘手凶恶的小型短斧斩铁如泥，断钢如削肉。

description.canonical: Battlefield butchery becomes all too easy with a Krohkur blade in each hand.
description.display: 双手持有克鲁古尔之刃能让战场中的杀戮变得轻而易举

description.canonical: This hooked blade rewards critical hits to those skilled enough to strike with finesse.
description.display: 这把钩刃能在拥有精湛技艺的人手里造成致命的打击。

description.canonical: The cruelest of weapons built for the crudest of Grineer soldiers. Rips through metal like flesh, and through flesh like day-old pudding.
description.display: 为那些最粗鲁的 Grineer 士兵所打造的最残忍的武器。削铁如肉，割肉如泥。

description.canonical: Overwhelm hostiles with this jet-powered sickle and razor-chain weapon. Charged strikes ignite an explosive blast at range.
description.display: 用这把喷气动力的镰刀和锋利锁链武器击垮你的敌人。蓄力攻击可以点燃一次远距离的爆破。

description.canonical: A crushing, killing, rocket-powered stab-hammer. Grineer, naturally.
description.display: 一款以碾碎与杀戮为卖点的火箭动力刺锤。这显然是 Grineer 的杰作。

description.canonical: A shattered talisman of the Grineer Elder Queen. It pulls health orbs from deceased enemies and energy orbs from destroyed robots.
description.display: Grineer 大女皇的护身物，虽已破碎但仍具有神秘力量。能从死去敌人身上取得生命球，或从被破坏的机器人中取得能量球。

description.canonical: The Slaytra is a powerful reiteration of the traditional Grineer Machete that doubles the duration of 切割Slash Status Effects.
description.display: 屠煞是对传统 Grineer 砍刀的强大重现，它可以使 切割切割伤害的出血持续时间加倍。

description.canonical: When they go high, go low. Powerful pneumatic grips and toecaps amplify every blow. Four ways to deal twice the pain.
description.display: 当他们出上拳的时候，你就出下拳。强大的气动握把和尖锐的部分可以强化每一次攻击。多达四种方法来施放双倍的痛苦。

description.canonical: Inflict maximum devastation with this massive Grineer trident.
description.display: 这柄沉重的 Grineer 三叉戟能造成极致的毁灭。

description.canonical: Slash and blast with this heavy Gunblade of brutal Grineer design. High slash damage paired with a heavy shotgun attack.
description.display: 用这把凶猛的重型 Grineer 枪刃斩杀、爆破。高切割伤害与重型霰弹攻击相得益彰。

description.canonical: Orokin-era Grineer plated their scythes with gold as a symbol of dedication to their Golden Lords. Gains a percentage of Critical Chance with each Status Type affecting the target.
description.display: 奥罗金时代的 Grineer 战士将镰刀镀上黄金，以此象征他们对黄金之主的忠诚。每有一种异常状态影响目标，镰刀的暴击几率就会提升一定百分比。

description.canonical: Rend enemies and up the heat with these mining tools repurposed into machine-tonfa. Building the Combo Multiplier overheats the Tonkkatts, setting enemies ablaze.
description.display: 用这对由采矿工具改装而来的拐刃撕裂并点燃你的敌人。积累连击倍率将使武器过热，让敌人熊熊燃烧。

description.canonical: Fused with prisma crystals, these pristine Grineer sidearms are sure to intimidate any foe.
description.display: 熔合了棱晶，这崭新的 Grineer 随身武器能恐吓到任何敌人。

description.canonical: Firing a sticky, toxic, explosive compound, the Stug Gel Gun offers multiple ejection modes, delivering maximum damage in all situations.
description.display: 史特克凝胶枪能发射出一种粘稠、有毒的爆炸混合物。且具有多种发射模式，在各种情况下都能造成最大伤害。

description.canonical: Simple but powerful. The semi-automatic Brakk hand cannon delivers a lot of punch in a small package.
description.display: 简单但威力强大，半自动布拉克手枪小型的枪身中却拥有强大的冲击火力。

description.canonical: The Marelok combines the stopping power of a rifle with the portability of a pistol.
description.display: 玛瑞火枪因为后坐力高而缺乏准度。

description.canonical: Creates and focuses a high-frequency field of microwaves, literally cooking the target from within.
description.display: 创造并聚焦一个高频率的微波场，从内部将目标确确实实地烤熟。

description.canonical: A compact four-barreled design packing a self-charging capacitor that discharges upon every reload from empty. Features auto hip-fire and aimed fire is semi-auto, four-shot instant burst.
description.display: 拥有紧凑的四管设计且装有一个自充电电容器，会在空枪装填时释放电流。腰射时为自动模式，瞄准时为瞬间射出四发子弹模式。

description.canonical: Doubling their volley on each successive shot, the Twin Kohmaks decimate foes in seconds.
description.display: 每次连续击发都有双倍的齐射子弹，双子寇恩霰机枪能够在数秒之内消灭敌人。

description.canonical: Like the larger Kohm, this hand-shotgun doubles its volley with each successive shot.
description.display: 像稍大的寇恩热能枪，这把手持霰弹枪连续射击时都会加倍射出能量弹。

description.canonical: The sidearm of choice for Prime Grineer warriors, Sagek Prime blends Grineer brutality with Orokin aesthetics. When Sagek Prime inflicts a critical hit, its next shot has a chance to gain significant Status Chance.
description.display: 作为精英 Grineer 战士的首选次要武器，杀格 Prime 融合了 Grineer 的残暴和 Orokin 的美学。当杀格 Prime 造成暴击时，其下一次射击有几率大幅提升触发几率。

description.canonical: These twin barrels of destruction are the signature pistols of the Kuva Guardians.
description.display: 这对能够带来破坏的枪管是赤毒守卫者手枪标志性的特征。

description.canonical: Rain hell on the enemy with this handheld cluster-rocket launcher.
description.display: 使用这把手持集束火箭发射器，对敌人投以地狱之火。

description.canonical: Inflict rapid-fire bursts of pain with this Grineer submachine gun.
description.display: 用这把 Grineer 冲锋枪的爆发速射特性来产生相应的苦痛。

description.canonical: This particle cannon generates a condensed beam of super-heated plasma designed to melt rock to ore, and enemies to molten slag.
description.display: 这把粒子加农炮能产生由超高温等离子体凝聚而成的射线。而这种射线可以用来冶炼矿石，也可以将敌人化为熔渣。

description.canonical: The uniquely styled Viper Wraith is a powerful variation on the standard machine-pistol.
description.display: 这把风格独一无二的蝰蛇·亡魂是基于制式机关手枪的强力变体。

description.canonical: The uniquely styled Twin Vipers Wraith are a powerful variation on the standard akimbo machine-pistols.
description.display: 独特风格的双子蝰蛇·亡魂拥有比原版更强的火力。

description.canonical: What the Aegrit lacks in quantity it makes up for in destructive power. Toss the Aegrit onto your enemy’s position then detonate remotely at the right moment for maximum destructive effect.
description.display: 骇敌榴弹虽然数量稀少但威力来补。将骇敌榴弹投掷到敌人的位置，然后在适当的时机远程引爆，以获得最大的破坏效果。

description.canonical: Overcome with Infestation, this bow's arrows now spread poisonous contagion to any surface they hit.
description.display: 受到感染者的侵蚀后，这把弓的箭矢能够在击中的任何表面散播病毒。

description.canonical: Amplify shockwaves of devastating sound with this Technocyte virus infested shotgun that hungers for blood, and desires nothing more than to feed upon its enemies. Alternative fire at enemies not vulnerable to Mercy Kills to swarm them with infested mites, while firing at vulnerable ones will perform a ranged execution.
description.display: 通过这把渴求饮血食肉的科技细胞病毒感染霰弹枪来放大毁灭性声音的冲击波。次要射击无法被怜悯之击攻击的敌人，用感染螨虫将他们包围，而射击能被怜悯之击攻击的敌人则可远程处决。

description.canonical: With increased magazine size, the Coda Bubonico was born of the Technocyte virus' need to spread infection. Primary Fire rate ramps up with continuous fire.
description.display: 终幕·横痃重炮增加了弹匣容量，其设计源于科技细胞病毒对传播感染的渴望。持续射击时，主要射击的射速会逐渐提升。

description.canonical: The Technocyte virus did nothing but increase the Hema’s thirst for blood. With increased Fire Rate, Magazine Size, Critical Chance, Critical Damage, Status Chance, and Damage.
description.display: 科技细胞病毒没有起到什么作用，只是增加了血肢的嗜血性。具有更高的射速、弹匣容量、暴击几率、暴击伤害、触发几率和伤害。

description.canonical: Delivers a virus-laden barb to its victim that continues to damage it before exploding. With increased Damage, Reload Speed, Magazine Size, Status Chance, and explosion radius.
description.display: 向受害者投掷一个携带病毒的倒钩，持续造成伤害直至爆炸。具有更高的伤害、装填速度、弹匣容量、触发几率和爆炸半径。

description.canonical: Firing a nonstop stream of vile corrosive gastric juice, the Coda Synapse comes with increased Magazine size, Beam Length, Status Chance, Punch Through, and Damage.
description.display: 终幕·突触生化枪可以持续发射恶臭腐蚀性胃液。具有更高的弹匣容量、光束长度、触发几率、穿透和伤害。

description.canonical: The Coda Caustacyst scythe is a force to be reckoned with, the Technocyte virus honing it with improved Damage, Status Chance, and Critical Damage, as well as acid pools with longer duration.
description.display: 终幕·灼蚀变体镰是一股不容小觑的力量，科技细胞病毒对其进行了改良，提高了伤害、触发几率和暴击伤害，并且具有持续时间更长的酸液池。

description.canonical: Rip and shred your enemies to pieces with the Coda Hirudo. With improved Damage, Status Chance, Critical Chance, and Critical Damage.
description.display: 使用终幕·蚂蟥将敌人撕成碎片。具有更高的伤害、触发几率、暴击几率和暴击伤害。

description.canonical: The Plague Year of 1999 will never be the same. With improved Critical Multipler, Critical Chance, and Status Chance, the Technocyte virus has turned the Coda Mire into a truly horrifying blade.
description.display: 1999 年的瘟疫年将不再一样。科技细胞病毒通过增加暴击倍率、暴击几率和触发几率，将终幕·米尔变成了一把真正可怕的利刃。

description.canonical: Enhanced by Technocyte mutations, the Coda Pathocyst comes with increased Damage, Critical Chance, Critical Damage and Status Chance. While in-flight or on contact with the enemy, it will occasionally spawn enhanced, enemy-seeking miasmites.
description.display: 终幕·病囊飞刃通过科技细胞突变的强化，具有更高的伤害、暴击几率、暴击伤害和触发几率。在飞行中或与敌人接触时，它偶尔会生成增强的、自动搜寻敌人的自爆虫。

description.canonical: Drive home the pain with this hammer evolved from a scooter assembly. The wheel shapeshifts and gains a unique buff to match whatever type of physical damage it has been modded for.
description.display: 挥舞这把从摩托车组件变异而来的战锤，将苦痛根植在你的敌人心中。其上的车轮将随着武器所配置的主要物理伤害类型而改变形状并获得独特增益。

description.canonical: Get the job done right with a pair of spore flinging terror tools. Inflicts a spore that spreads to nearby enemies on death causing Cold Status Effect and increased vulnerability to damage from the Torxica.
description.display: 用这对令人胆寒的孢子发射器完成任务。孢子感染会在敌人死亡时传播到附近的敌人身上，造成 冰冻异常状态，并且孢蚀双枪会更容易对这些敌人造成伤害。

description.canonical: When the magazine reaches empty and is manually reloaded, the Coda Catabolyst launches not one but three powerful grenades. Also has a higher Status Chance, Damage, and Magazine Size.
description.display: 当弹匣空了并且手动重新装填时，终幕·异化者会发射三枚威力极大的手榴弹，而不是一枚。同时还具有更高的触发几率、伤害和弹匣容量。

description.canonical: These festering, writhing, throwable projectiles of pus and gas have been improved with a greater Magazine Size, Critical Chance, Critical Damage, Status Chance, and Damage.
description.display: 这些溃烂、扭动、可投掷的脓气投射物已得到改进，具有更高的弹匣容量、暴击几率、暴击伤害、触发几率和伤害。

description.canonical: The Technocyte virus has contorted this Tysis into a more lethal weapon. With increased Damage, Critical Chance, Critical Damage and Magazine Capacity.
description.display: 科技细胞病毒将啐沫者扭曲成更致命的武器。伤害、暴击几率、暴击伤害和弹匣容量均有所提升。

description.canonical: Rain down a triple volley of explosive disease bladders from a distance, then move in for the kill by unloading a multi-shot barrage of toxic barbs with primary fire.
description.display: 可远距离投下三连爆炸性病毒囊腔，随后可通过主要射击一次性释放出多重毒螫来消灭敌人。

description.canonical: A bizarre union of Corpus technology and Infested biology, this automatic rifle can also deploy an irradiated airborne infested mass. Further field testing is required to fully understand the potential of this weapon.
description.display: 这是一个 Corpus 科技与感染生物的奇特组合，这把自动步枪也能发射出一种带有辐射性的可通过空气传播的感染物质。为了全面了解这把武器的潜在能力，还需要更多的实地测试。

description.canonical: Powered by a bio-chemical reaction, the Infested Synapse rifle fries its targets with a steady stream of 腐蚀Corrosive energy.
description.display: 由生化反应驱动，被感染的突触生化枪通过一束稳定的腐蚀腐蚀能量炙烤目标。

description.canonical: This long-distance rifle fires a razor-sharp, virus-soaked barb that continues to attack its host before violently erupting in a spore-laden mist. Scoped headshots increase lethality.
description.display: 这把长射程步枪发射锋利且浸透病毒的倒钩，在猛烈爆发出充满孢子的雾气前，它会继续攻击其宿主。开镜爆头可增加杀伤力。

description.canonical: A bloodsucker. This symbiotic burst-rifle leeches health to forge its ammo and then restores health with each headshot.
description.display: 一把吸血者。这把点放式的共生步枪会吸取生命来铸造弹药，并在每次爆头射击时恢复生命。

description.canonical: Completely overwhelmed by Infested biology, this former Quanta now fires organic ordnance and a harpoon like appendage.
description.display: 被感染生物体完全包覆，这种形态的量子切割器会射出类似器质性的附肢尖叉。

description.canonical: Fires seven beams of continuous biochemical energy which depletes the life of any surface they contact.
description.display: 射出七道持续性的生化能量，侵蚀任何物质的表面，使其寿命枯竭。

description.canonical: Twisted and tortured from exposure to the Infestation, this glaive becomes an absolute predator in the hands of the right Tenno.
description.display: 由于接触到感染者变得疯狂而扭曲，这把战刃在能熟练的 Tenno 手中会成为绝对的掠食者。

description.canonical: Each strike of this infested glaive infects its target with viral pathogens. Occasionally, it discharges the spores of rabid, enemy-seeking maggots, either in-flight or on contact with the enemy.
description.display: 这把感染战刃的每一次攻击都会让目标感染病原体。而在飞行或与敌人接触时，它偶尔还会释放出狂乱的孢子以及追踪敌人的蛆虫。

description.canonical: Heavy attacks from this scythe unleash a wave of acid that mutilates enemies and leaves a trail of corrosive sludge.
description.display: 这把镰刀的重击会释放出一道酸液，分解敌人并留下一条腐蚀的泥泞。

description.canonical: Leave your mark with these infected claws with increased heavy attack range. Heavy attack at max combo to keep the extended range and slam radius for 3 minutes.
description.display: 这些感染利爪可以在更大的重击范围内留下你的印记。达到最高连击数时进行重击，可以保持持续三分钟的、更大的攻击范围和震地半径。

description.canonical: Slash through enemies with two leaves of the exceedingly rare Arum Spinosa plant. Heavy Attack to whip a flurry of toxic spines at ranged attackers.
description.display: 用两片极其罕见的疆南星刺植物的叶子砍杀敌人。重击对范围内的攻击者抽出一连串的毒刺。

description.canonical: Rip into the enemy with fists of razor sharp cartilage. Steals health with each critical hit.
description.display: 以拳头上如同剃刀般的锋利软骨切入敌人，每次暴击时窃取生命。

description.canonical: Pummel and infect with these two pulsating hunks of flesh connected by a ligament. Take-hold of the malignant evolution of an ancient martial weapon.
description.display: 用这两块被韧带连接的脉动肉块进行击打和感染。掌握古代军用武器的恶毒演变。

description.canonical: A two-pronged attack; the bone-grafted cocoon at the tip of this polearm rends flesh, while the viral mass living within spreads itself into the wounds of each new victim.
description.display: 双管齐下的夹击；棍尖端包覆的带骨茧状物把血肉撕裂，而其中的病毒块则会扩散到每个新受害人的伤口。

description.canonical: This bone-forged sword includes a tendon-whip to distract and maim the enemy.
description.display: 这把由骨头锻造的刀包含了肌腱皮鞭用以混淆与残害敌人。

description.canonical: A relic from the Great Plague, the Mire Infested Sword is a brutal weapon. It not only cuts into the enemy, it infects the wounds of its victim with a toxic nerve poison. Deals Toxin Damage on Ground Slam attacks.
description.display: 米尔感染之剑是一柄来自「大瘟疫」时期的残暴武器。不仅能切开敌人，更能在其伤口染上神经剧毒。此外，米尔在震地攻击时会造成 毒素伤害。

description.canonical: An instrument of unrelenting harm. If Lesion tastes blood, it becomes invigorated with faster Attack Speed and increased Toxin Damage.
description.display: 能造成严重伤害的一把武器。如果病变尝到了血的味道，其就会变得很有活力，攻击速度加快的同时会增加 毒素伤害。

description.canonical: The Scoliac Whip is a nasty parasitic growth of sinew and bone that can inflict heart stopping Toxin Damage with attacks.
description.display: 这条脊椎节鞭是由一只令人生厌的寄生虫增生出肌腱与骨头而成形。攻击时能造成会让心脏停止跳动的 毒素伤害。

description.canonical: Splatter enemies with a short-range stream of corrosive bile and then toss the ammo bladder as a grenade when reloading. The emptier the pistol’s ammo bladder, the more potent its damage. A fully empty bladder packs the biggest punch.
description.display: 可在短距离内向敌人喷射腐蚀性胆汁，此外，弹药囊腔可在装填时被用作投掷手雷。手枪的弹药囊腔越空，其造成的伤害就越强。完全射空的囊腔能发挥出最大的威力。

description.canonical: The Tysis pistol spits out caustic darts that corrode their victims from within.
description.display: 啐沫者手枪借由喷吐出具有腐蚀性的毒镖，将受害者由内而外地侵蚀殆尽。

description.canonical: A living weapon, the infested Embolist pistol kills its victims with an acidic venomous gas.
description.display: 活生生的武器，被感染的安柏勒斯手枪用酸性有毒气体杀死受害者。

description.canonical: These festering sacs of pus and gas burst violently on impact.
description.display: 受到冲击时，这些充满脓水和气体的溃烂脓包会剧烈地爆开。

description.canonical: Infect your foes with this spore-scattering pistol. Headshots burrow in and explode, releasing spore clouds that seek out nearby enemies.
description.display: 用这件散射孢子的手枪来感染你的敌人。爆头射击会钻入敌人的体内并爆炸，释放出飘向附近敌人的孢子云。

description.canonical: Brain-strikes excite this bioweapon, causing it to rapidly release toxic munitions.
description.display: 对敌人造成爆头射击会刺激这把生物武器，能迅速发射毒素弹药。

description.canonical: This pre-Orokin weapon earned its popularity for its reliability in tough conditions. When hip-firing, its Ammo Efficiency increases. When aiming, headshots have a high Critical Chance.
description.display: 这款前奥罗金时代的武器因其在恶劣条件下的可靠性而广受欢迎。腰射时，弹药效率会提高。瞄准时，爆头有极高的暴击几率。

description.canonical: Perforate Techrot, and anyone else who stands in your way, with this Scaldra machine gun. Alternative fire pummels targets with Efervon laced buckshot.
description.display: 使用这把炽蛇军机枪扫射科腐者和任何胆敢阻挡你的人。次要射击使用涂有艾弗旺的霰弹重击目标。

description.canonical: The standard issue personal Efervon projector, as sported by all ranks of Scaldra.
description.display: 标准的单兵艾弗旺喷射器，各个军衔的炽蛇军都配有此武器。

description.canonical: Reap what the Techrot have sown with this vicious pair of Scaldra hand-scythes.
description.display: 用这对凶恶的炽蛇军镰刀来收获科腐者所播种的恶果。

description.canonical: Put them down so that they stay down, with this Scaldra slug launcher.
description.display: 用这把炽蛇军武器让敌人再起不能。

description.canonical: A true masterpiece of Höllvanian engineering, Vesper 77's advanced laser sight highlights enemy Weak Points with precision. Aim to increase its Critical Damage Multiplier.
description.display: 夜语者 77 是霍瓦尼亚工程的真正杰作，其先进的激光瞄准器可突出显示敌人的弱点。瞄准来提高其暴击伤害倍率。

description.canonical: The MK1-Bo is the standard issue staff weapon for all Tenno.
description.display: MK1-玻之武杖是给Tenno的标准配置棍棒武器。

description.canonical: The MK1-Furax is the standard issue fist weapon for all Tenno.
description.display: MK1-弗拉克斯是给Tenno的标准配置拳套。

description.canonical: The MK1-Furis are the standard issue automatic pistol for all Tenno.
description.display: MK1-盗贼是给Tenno的标准配置自动手枪。

description.canonical: The MK1-Kunai is the standard issue throwing knives for all Tenno.
description.display: MK1-苦无是给Tenno的标准配置投掷武器。

description.canonical: The MK1-Paris is the standard issue bow for all Tenno.
description.display: MK1-帕里斯是给Tenno的标准配置弓箭。

description.canonical: The Strun is a standard shotgun. Reliable, versatile and deadly.
description.display: 斯特朗是一把标准的霰弹枪，可靠，灵活，致命。

description.canonical: An electrified jolter for quick melee takedowns, assembled from scavenged scrap. Ideal for use on unsuspecting opponents.
description.display: 用废料组装而成的电击器，可用于快速近战攻坚。非常适合用来对付毫无防备的对手。

description.canonical: A silent, pistol-style Amp for the Drifter. Generates its own ammunition from Void energy. A precisely timed reload over-charges the next shot.
description.display: 一款为漂泊者设计的手枪式消音增幅器。从虚空能量中汲取弹药。在精准的时机进行装填会使下一次射击获得额外充能。

description.canonical: The Sentient slayer. An offering from Ballas.
description.display: Sentient 猎杀者。来自 Ballas。

description.canonical: Caliban’s signature scythe, forged from a limb wrenched off a fallen Eidolon centuries ago. 50% increased Melee Combo Counter Chance when wielded by Caliban.
description.display: Caliban 的标志性镰刀，由几个世纪前从一个倒下的夜灵身上扯下的肢体锻造而成。被 Caliban 挥舞时，有 50% 几率获得额外近战连击数。

description.canonical: Deliver a ruthless barrage of Sentient artillery from this instrument of death. Alt-fire splits the weapon apart into separate rifles, expanding its devastation by tracking up to 4 targets at once, while consuming more ammo per shot.
description.display: 通过这件死亡利器释放无情的 Sentient 炮火。次要射击可将武器拆分为 8 把独立的步枪，同时锁定最多 4 个目标，进一步扩展其毁灭威力，但每发射击将消耗更多弹药。

description.canonical: This Sentient war instrument can either barrage targets with explosive bolts or draw on its regenerative battery to create twin plasma beams that chain through targets. When fully drained, Health is leeched from nearby foes for a short period.
description.display: 这种 Sentient 军械可以用爆炸投射物密集轰击目标，也可以利用其可再生电池制造出两股将多个目标束缚在一起的等离子光束。当电量完全耗尽时，会在短时间内吸取附近敌人的生命值。

description.canonical: This arm-cannon, ripped from a Sentient, rapid-fires thermal pulses that explode in an electrical blast. Features an ammo-less quick charge capacitor, that emits a knock-back pulse and strips Sentient damage resistances when fully discharged.
description.display: 这种从 Sentient 身上扯下来的手炮能快速射出热脉冲，并在电击中爆炸。它有一个不需要弹药的快充电容器，在完全放电时会发出回弹脉冲并解除 Sentient 的伤害抗性。

description.canonical: Bring down judgement, with this boltor crafted by the Arbiters of Hexis.
description.display: 用这把均衡仲裁者锻造的螺钉步枪降下审判。

description.canonical: Spinning attacks unleash the Stormpath, a tempest of mayhem that hurls any foes in its way.
description.display: 旋转式攻击会释放「暴风之道」，如同风暴般的破坏将其路径的任何敌人猛力甩出。

description.canonical: For the Arbiters of Hexis these pistols are more than simple weapons, they are symbols of truth and discipline.
description.display: 对均衡仲裁者来说，这对手枪不单只是寻常的武器，它们是真相与纪律的象征。

description.canonical: Cephalon Suda's custom issue Simulor was built to satisfy her curiosity.
description.display: 中枢苏达的自定义改造重力奇点拟成枪，仅只是为了满足她的好奇心所打造。

description.canonical: This intelligent hammer takes an enemy killed by a Heavy Attack and recomposes them as an ally. Any fatal strike with this weapon also performs a Codex scan.
description.display: 这柄智能的锤子吸收被重击击杀的敌人，并将他们改组为友军。这把武器造成的任何致死攻击也会进行一次资料库扫描。

description.canonical: Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.
description.display: 原为使矿物迅速蒸发以便于分析作业而设计，然而使用者却发现它强大的光束对于终结敌人也同样有效。

description.canonical: Deployed by the Cephalon Suda, once a data-analyzing instrument the Gammacor main focus is defense.
description.display: 由中枢苏达所设置，过去曾作为数据分析仪器，但现在已转为专用于自卫的武器。

description.canonical: Echo nature's violent beauty with this special Tigris.
description.display: 这把特制猛虎呼应了大自然的暴戾之美。

description.canonical: Each charged attack turns the enemy’s pain into a healing pulse that washes over allies. Also, creates resistance to Status Effects when held.
description.display: 蓄力攻击将敌人的伤痛转化成波及战友的治愈脉冲。除此之外，持取时将产生对异常状态的抵抗力。

description.canonical: This remotely detonated electrical trap is used by devotees of New Loka to protect their temples and shrines.
description.display: 这种能遥控引爆的电击陷阱是新世间的信徒用来保护他们的寺庙与圣殿的武器。

description.canonical: Ruthless and efficient, just like the free-market.
description.display: 如同自由市场一般，重效率，不讲情面。

description.canonical: Whip the enemy out of their ill-gotten gains; double credit drops on kills.
description.display: 把敌人的非法获益抽打出来；击杀时使现金掉落翻倍。

description.canonical: The favored side-arms of Perrin Sequence executives, these pistols have been modified to improve efficiency and killing potential.
description.display: 受佩兰数列高层人员青睐的贴身武器，这对手枪已经过改造来提升效率与击杀潜力。

description.canonical: A finely tuned instrument of assassination.
description.display: 一把精巧的刺杀工具。

description.canonical: Infiltrate undetected; reduced visibility when held. Then strike with confidence; hits to irradiated targets restores shields and creates overshields.
description.display: 隐蔽入侵：持取时降低自身可见度。紧接着挥出自信一击：击中被辐射的目标可以恢复护盾并产生过载护盾。

description.canonical: This modified ballistica is the weapon of choice used by Red Veil Assassins to take out high-priority marks.
description.display: 这把经过改造的布里斯提卡是血色面纱的刺客用来解决高度优先目标的首选武器。

description.canonical: Forged in the fires of rebel struggle, this shotgun is a force for liberation.
description.display: 在反抗拼搏的烈焰中铸造，造就这把成为自由解放之力的散弹枪。

description.canonical: Justice blinds. Block hits to charge a Radial Blind, when fully charged Block+Heavy Attack to unleash it.
description.display: 正义会让人失明。每一次被格挡的攻击会为致盲充能，当充满时用格挡+重击来释放它。

description.canonical: Taken from defeated Grineer commanders and rebuilt to improve combat efficiency and reliability.
description.display: 取自于战败的 Grineer 指挥官，并经过重构来提升作战效率和可靠性。

description.canonical: Furis pistols equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and slightly faster Fire Rate, but Accuracy and Reload Speed are lowered.
description.display: 双手各装备一把盗贼手枪，具有两倍的弹匣容量与稍快的射速，但精准度会下降，且换弹的速度增长。

description.canonical: A Bolto equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and slightly faster Fire Rate, but reload time is doubled and accuracy is lowered.
description.display: 双手各装备一把螺钉手枪，具有两倍的弹匣容量与稍快的射速，但精准度会下降，且需两倍的换弹时间。

description.canonical: A Lato equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and Fire Rate, but Reload time is doubled and Accuracy is lowered.
description.display: 每只手持一把拉托，双倍弹匣和射速，但双倍装填时间，且精度更差。

description.canonical: A Bronco equipped in each hand.
description.display: 双手各持一把野马。

description.canonical: A Viper equipped in each hand.
description.display: 每只手持一把蝰蛇。

description.canonical: Dual Lex pistols double the amount of high caliber lead you can throw at the enemy, but accuracy and reload time suffer.
description.display: 以雷克斯双枪的两只大口径枪管朝敌人开火，但精准度和装填时间会受到负面影响。

description.canonical: Savage the enemy with a Lex Prime in each hand.
description.display: 双手各持一把雷克斯 Prime 猛攻敌人。

description.canonical: Twice the ammo and twice the stopping power of a single Magnus.
description.display: 和一把麦格努斯相比有双倍弹药和双倍后坐力。

description.canonical: Fill your fists with golden cannons of fury. This refined design unlocks quicker handling and higher critical chance.
description.display: 给你的拳中塞上这愤怒的金色教条。这种精良的设计可加快操作速度并提高暴击几率。

description.canonical: Vasto revolvers equipped in each hand.
description.display: 双手各持一把瓦斯托左轮手枪。

description.canonical: Used together, these Orokin pistols feed off each other, inflicting greater damage with an enhanced status chance for inducing elemental effects on targets.
description.display: 同时使用这两把相辅相成的奥罗金手枪 ，以更高的元素触发几率，来对目标造成更大的伤害。

description.canonical: This laser bladed battle-axe easily hacks through a ship's defenses and the forces protecting it.
description.display: 这把激光刀刃的战斧能轻易突破船只的防御和保卫船只的武装力量。

description.canonical: Using Archwing's jets for thrust, this massive hammer crushes anything in its path.
description.display: 利用了曲翼的喷射推动力，这把巨大的铁锤能击碎其挥舞路径中的任何物体。

description.canonical: Become an angel of death, with this Archwing scythe.
description.display: 拿起这把曲翼镰刀，化身为死亡天使。

description.canonical: Weightless space turns this impossibly massive sword into an agile instrument of destruction.
description.display: 零重力的太空将这把大到难以想象的巨剑变成了敏捷的毁灭工具。

description.canonical: Part sword, part shield, the Centaur excels at charging headlong into enemy fire.
description.display: 部分为剑，部分为盾，半人马剑盾专擅于突进敌军炮火之中。

description.canonical: Tear apart incoming enemies with this massive hooked blade.
description.display: 用这柄强大的钩状刀刃撕裂来袭的敌人。

description.canonical: Heavy attacks briefly transform the Corufell into a Gunblade. After the Gunblade fires, the Corufell returns to its Heavy Scythe state. Its transformation is fastest in Citrine's hands.
description.display: 重击会在短时间内将闪劫变形为一把枪刃。枪刃开火后，闪劫返回其重型镰刀状态。Citrine 使用时，它的变形速度最为快速。

description.canonical: Gallium-alloy gauntlets for close-range Archwing combat. Designed by the infamous Tyl Regor.
description.display: 为曲翼近距离作战所制的镓合金动力拳套。由恶名昭彰的泰尔·雷工设计。

description.canonical: A rare object of beauty, this Archwing sword has been sheathed in prisma crystal and baptized in the Void’s energy.
description.display: 这把曲翼之剑包覆在棱晶之中且沐浴着虚空的能量，成为了稀有而美丽的存在。

description.canonical: Unload deadly accurate bursts of mayhem.
description.display: 释放出致命般精准的爆发性混乱。

description.canonical: Devastate free-space enemies with Phaedra, the Soma's big-sister.
description.display: 借由这把菲德菈——月神最年长的姊妹——纵横太空尽情毁灭敌人。

description.canonical: Delivering twin streams of highly accurate, rapid-fire ordnance, the Decurion are specifically designed for combat in the vacuum of space.
description.display: 什长双枪是专门为了在真空的太空之下战斗，能急速发射双道高精准弹幕的武器。

description.canonical: Colder than space and less forgiving, Prisma crystals bring elite efficiency to the already sleek Dual Decurion. Requiring the lightest of touches to reload, these twin archguns prove that heavy weaponry can still possess elegance.
description.display: 比太空更冷酷无情，棱晶为已经很时尚的什长双枪带来了卓越的效率。只需轻轻一碰即可装填弹药，这把双持曲翼枪械证明了重型武器也可以保持优雅。

description.canonical: A long range rifle capable of firing in space, the Imperator's versatility makes it an ideal weapon for space combat.
description.display: 能在太空中开火的长射程步枪，凯旋将军的多用性使得它成为在太空作战时理想的武器。

description.canonical: The Imperator Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the barrel.
description.display: 这款为 Tenno 量身打造的凯旋将军·破坏者带有蓝绿色的金属质感，枪管上还有 Lotus 的铭刻。

description.canonical: When fully charged, this flak cannon delivers a devastating shot. Perfect for taking down fast-moving interceptors.
description.display: 充能完毕后，这台高射加农炮能击发出毁灭性的炮击。完美地击落快速移动的拦截机。

description.canonical: Nokko’s signature archgun fires six homing missiles, each bearing a payload of one of the six combined elements which detonate in an area upon impact.
description.display: Nokko 的标志性曲翼枪械可发射六枚追踪导弹，每枚导弹都运载着六种组合元素之一，命中时会在区域内引爆。

description.canonical: Flaunting ceremonial beauty, this arch gun flak cannon is even more devastating than its standard issue counterpart.
description.display: 招摇又考究的美人，这款曲翼枪械版高射炮比其标准版更具破坏性。

description.canonical: Embrace pandemonium. Chainfire and explosive potential meet in Larkspur Prime. Hildryn packs more ammo when she wields this mighty weapon.
description.display: 迎接混乱的到来吧。连锁攻击和爆炸潜能在翠雀 Prime 身上相遇。当 Hildryn 使用这件强大的武器时，她会携带更多的弹药。

description.canonical: When fully charged, the magnetized barrel of the Velocitus accelerates a metal slug to tremendous speeds, piercing hulls and obliterating armor.
description.display: 当充能完成后，极速电磁步枪的磁化枪管能将金属子弹加速至极限，使其轻易的摧毁装甲，贯穿船身。

description.canonical: Shatter your targets with explosive shells from this devastating Archwing cannon.
description.display: 这把毁灭性的曲翼火炮能发射爆裂弹来击碎你的目标。

description.canonical: An Archwing energy weapon that sends waves of deadly plasma crashing into enemies.
description.display: 一把能射出致命等离子波来击溃敌人的曲翼能量武器。

description.canonical: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati for use by their Necramechs. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy flamethrower with surprising range. Secondary fire launches three projectiles in a fan pattern that explode, leaving a damaging area of effect for a short duration.
description.display: 英择谛为其殁世机甲所设计的古老武器。主要射击可从目标身上吸取生命精华，以助燃次要射击带来的毁灭性攻击。这把重型火焰喷射器拥有惊人的射程。次要射击可扇形投射三枚爆炸弹丸，并在短时间内留下一片破坏性区域。

description.canonical: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati for use by their Necramechs. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. Punishing automatic primary fire and a secondary mode that charges up to unleash a destructive beam of energy with a large explosion at point of impact.
description.display: 英择谛为其殁世机甲所设计的古老武器。主要射击可从目标身上吸取生命精华，以助燃次要射击带来的毁灭性攻击。拥有惩戒性的全自动主要射击。次要模式可在充能后释放一道破坏性能量束，并在作用点造成大范围爆炸。

description.canonical: Blast through enemies with a double-barreled shot of energized slugs. This siphons their life essence which is then used to generate the secondary fire's massive air-burst mortar. The ancient Entrati weapon was built for Necramechs but also functions as an Archgun.
description.display: 通过双管射出的充能弹头来轰击敌人。这会吸取他们的生命精华，然后将其用于生成次要射击的大规模空爆迫击炮。这件古老的英择谛武器是为殁世机甲打造的，但也可以作为一把曲翼枪械来使用。

description.canonical: Mandonel fires 辐射Radiation Damage projectiles. Partially charged shots release a spread and fully charged shots release a beam that dissolves into a radiation field. Projectiles that pass through the field are empowered.
description.display: 辐光弩炮发射 辐射辐射伤害投射物。未完全充能的射击会散射，而完全充能的射击则会释放出光束并生成辐射力场。穿过力场的投射物会被增强。

description.canonical: From death blooms the Larkspur. A unique and menacing Archgun with a wild initial attack that locks onto a target then chains other targets close to the first. It also sports an explosive projectile mode. In Hildryn's grip the Larkspur carries more reserve ammo.
description.display: 从死亡之中生长的翠雀。一把独特且具有威胁性的曲翼枪械，初始攻击会锁定目标并将靠近第一个目标的其他敌人链在一起。它还配有爆炸性投弹模式。在 Hildryn 的握持之下，翠雀会携带更多的预备弹药。

description.canonical: Bring hell to the battlefield with Uriel's signature rifle and bayonet combination. Occupying both primary and melee slots, this unique weapon blends precision marksmanship with unrelenting melee combat.
description.display: 通过 Uriel 的标志性步枪和刺刀组合，将地狱之火带入战场。这把独特的武器既可作为主要武器也可作为近战武器，完美融合了精准的射击和毫不留情的近战攻击。

description.canonical: Bring hell to the battlefield with Uriel's signature rifle and bayonet combination. Occupying both primary and melee slots, this unique weapon blends precision marksmanship with unrelenting melee combat.
description.display: 通过 Uriel 的标志性步枪和刺刀组合，将地狱之火带入战场。这把独特的武器既可作为主要武器也可作为近战武器，完美融合了精准的射击和毫不留情的近战攻击。

description.canonical: Evoking the design of ancient bows, the high impact Cernos is perfect for hunting down highly shielded enemies.
description.display: 这把冲击力强大的西诺斯长弓十分擅长猎杀高护盾的敌人，让人回想起古代长弓的设计。

description.canonical: Daikyu takes great strength to draw back, but provides added power and range to every shot.
description.display: 大久和弓需要相当程度的施力才能开弓，但每次射击同时也提供了更强的威力与更远的射程。

description.canonical: The versatile Cinta can fire arrows in quick succession, quickly charge a shock wave, or fully charge a powerful focused shot.
description.display: 遂心的功能非常多样化，可以快速连续地射出箭矢，迅速充能释放冲击震波，或完全充能并进行威力强大的聚焦式射击。

description.canonical: Based on one of the world's oldest weapon designs, this Tenno-crafted weapon can be used both in stealth and in open combat. The Paris uses a chargeable magnetic field to launch arrows capable of impaling enemies to walls.
description.display: 以世界最古老的武器设计为基础，Tenno 所制作的武器不论隐匿行动和交火接战均可使用。帕里斯可利用磁场蓄力，其射出的箭矢足以将敌人钉在墙上。

description.canonical: Hunhow’s gift, carved from the bones of his kin. Shots can be charged and held; release them just before full charge for maximum effect.
description.display: Hunhow 的礼物，由其亲属的骨头雕刻而成。射击时可以充能并维持该状态；在完全充能前一刻发射即可获得最佳效果。

description.canonical: A noble bow to hunt hellish beasts.
description.display: 一把用来狩猎恶兽的高贵之弓。

description.canonical: Long believed lost, the mighty Daikyu Prime was the pride of many a Tenno dojo. Designed to strike the foe where they are weakest, its powerful shots repay careful marksmanship.
description.display: 长久以来，人们一直认为强大的大久和弓 Prime 早已失传，它是许多 Tenno 道场的骄傲。它旨在直击敌人的弱点，其强大的射击威力与精湛的射击技术相得益彰。

description.canonical: Each arrow spawns a swarm of sticky appendages on impact. These tongue-like probes latch onto nearby unfortunates and drag them close before bursting into a mess of diseased goo.
description.display: 每支箭在冲击时都会产生大量的粘稠附着物。这些像舌头一样的探针会吸附在附近的倒霉蛋身上，并把他们拖近，然后爆裂形成一团病害黏液。

description.canonical: Discovered deep inside an ancient Orokin derelict, the Paris Prime increases the kinetic energy of any bolt it fires, dealing more damage than its more common counterpart.
description.display: 从遗弃的古老奥罗金船只的深处中发现的帕里斯 Prime，比原版提升了更多箭矢的动能，能造成更多的伤害。

description.canonical: Dread is the calling card of The Stalker. It fires arrows that can decapitate.
description.display: 恐惧是追猎者的标志性武器，其射出的箭矢足以取人首级。

description.canonical:
Counter the dread of battle with a song of praise. Enemies cannot hurt your allies while wounded by Evensong's arrows. Kills with Evensong empower ally weapons with Multishot.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.
description.display:
用赞美之歌来对抗战斗中的恐惧。被晚祷之箭所伤的敌人将无法伤害你的友军。使用晚祷击杀敌人将增强友军的武器的多重射击。

当晚祷、歌颂与和谐一同奏响时，体验 Jade 之合奏真正的力量。

description.canonical: Claim the power of Albrecht Entrati's knowledge. Customize the Grimoire with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Its alternate attack releases a voltaic orb with guaranteed Electricity Status.
description.display: 获取阿尔布雷希特·英择谛的全知之力。使用典籍 Mod 增强战甲技能并获得战术优势。次要射击发射一颗必定造成 电击异常状态的电弧球。

description.canonical: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the third anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.
description.display: 这是 Lotus 为第一位从低温催眠中醒来的 Tenno 所准备的一份 3 周年纪念礼物。

description.canonical: The double-barreled Tigris shotgun fires two bursts in rapid succession, easily taking down the toughest prey.
description.display: 猛虎双管霰弹枪能快速连续的双弹齐发，轻松地拿下棘手的猎物。

description.canonical: Forged by a master gunsmith, this Tenno burst rifle will strike down targets with swift precision.
description.display: 由大师级枪械制造工匠打造的这把 Tenno 三连发步枪可以迅速精确地击倒目标。

description.canonical: Scope out the enemy with this long-range revolver style rifle.
description.display: 以这把长距离转轮式步枪彻底探清敌人。

description.canonical: Slash targets with a single precise bolt from Garuda's signature crossbow. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause 切割Slash Status, and Headshots have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.
description.display: Garuda 的标志性十字弓能以一支精准的弩矢斩断目标，而次要射击则能发射出弩矢弹幕；每支弩矢都有可能造成 切割切割异常状态，爆头射击则可加快装填速度。在被 Garuda 使用时，噬蛇弩会获得少量的穿透效果。

description.canonical: Depend on Higasa when it rains bullets. Aiming creates a shield that blocks weapon fire. Kills and blocked shots charge a beam released by Alternate Fire.
description.display: 依靠晴日伞抵御如雨倾泻的子弹。瞄准可形成一面盾牌，阻挡敌方武器的射击。击杀和阻挡射击将为次要射击充能，以释放光束。

description.canonical: Gyre's signature weapon has two fire modes. Primary fire shocks enemies with electrical orbs. Alternate fire is a large ball of electricity that sticks to any surface and pulses Electricity before it explodes. In Gyre's hands, the weapon has a small amount of multishot.
description.display: Gyre 的标志性武器有两种射击模式。主要射击可通过带电球体攻击敌人。次要射击可产生一个大型带电球体，该球体可附着在任何表面并在爆炸之前产生 带电脉冲。被 Gyre 使用时，该武器可产生少量的多重射击。

description.canonical: Deploy the radar disc to reveal hidden enemies and then strike with precision shots that punch through all obstacles in the way.
description.display: 部署雷达盘揭示隐藏的敌人，紧接着用足以穿透障碍的精确射击打击敌人。

description.canonical: Firing high-velocity blades, this weapon can also be used as a battle-saw, shredding anything unfortunate enough to get within range.
description.display: 发射高速刀刃，这把武器同时也能作为战斗用电锯，切碎任何进入攻击范围的倒霉鬼。

description.canonical: Kullervo's signature weapon boasts melee synergy. Every shot that lands increases the wielder's Melee Combo count. When Kullervo wields Rauta, it also increases his Melee Combo duration.
description.display: Kullervo 的标志性武器具有近战协同的优势。每次命中都会增加持枪者的近战连击数。当 Kullervo 使用锐铁时，它也会增加他的近战连击持续时间。

description.canonical: Engage your enemies with deadly speed. This weapon reloads even faster when its wielder sprints, faster still with Gauss.
description.display: 以致命的速度与敌人交战。当使用者冲刺时，会有更快的装填速度，搭配 Gauss 使用时，速度还会更快。

description.canonical: The gilded speargun of Styanax Prime shines like a beacon across the battlefield, invigorating allies and stunning enemies.
description.display: Styanax Prime 的镀金标枪如同战场上的灯塔般闪耀，鼓舞盟友，震慑敌人。

description.canonical: Orokin gold enhances the conductivity of Gyre Prime's signature rifle, enabling it to fire massive electrifying orbs.
description.display: 奥罗金黄金增强了 Gyre Prime 标志性步枪的导电性，使其能够发射巨大的带电球体。

description.canonical: Loose explosive glass slugs that tear through enemies with Gara’s signature shotgun, presented here in its spectacular Prime form.
description.display: Gara 标志性的霰弹枪以惊人的 Prime 形态呈现，可以射出爆炸性的玻璃弹头来击穿敌人。

description.canonical: This rapid-fire classic is the Orokin-engineered definition of silent, pinpoint lethality.
description.display: 这把经典的高射速冲锋枪体现了奥罗金工艺对于无声和精确杀伤的定义。

description.canonical: Fires Orokin designed bolts that are faster and sharper.
description.display: 射出由奥罗金设计、更快更尖锐的螺钉。

description.canonical: Once thought lost to the ages, attempts to reengineer the Burston Prime never fully replicated this weapon's power and agility.
description.display: 一度以为随着岁月流逝而失去踪迹，尝试研发伯斯顿 Prime 但从没能够复制出往日的威力以及操控性。

description.canonical: A golden shotgun, forged for those who deliver judgment.
description.display: 一把金色的霰弹枪，为那些执裁者而打造。

description.canonical: Heavy in the hand with a bone-crunching kickback. This Prime version of this shotgun adds remote detonation of the weapon's airburst round.
description.display: 份量不轻且具有相当的后坐力。这种霰弹枪的 Prime 版本可以将武器射出的空爆弹远程引爆。

description.canonical: Wield a storm. Fulmin Prime's electric rounds switch between lightning beams and short-range bursts. Wisp quickly swaps between each mode with her elemental prowess.
description.display: 唤起风暴。雷霆 Prime 的电击弹可在闪电光束和短距离点射之间切换。Wisp 凭借她的元素之力获得更快的模式切换速度。

description.canonical: Caliban Prime's signature sniper rifle is no mere ceremonial weapon. A sign, perhaps, that peace between Orokin and Sentient was destined to be fleeting. Struck enemies become lightning rods, with a chance to attract bolts of chain lightning that can jump to nearby enemies.
description.display: Caliban Prime 的标志性狙击步枪并非仅仅是仪式武器。它或许预示着奥罗金与 Sentient 之间的和平注定转瞬即逝。被击中的敌人会变成避雷针，有几率吸引连锁闪电，这些闪电会跳跃到附近的敌人身上。

description.canonical: A golden version of Garuda's versatile crossbow, as fashioned by the Orokin's finest weaponsmiths. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause 切割Slash Status, and Headshot kills have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda the Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.
description.display: Garuda 的标志性十字弓的镀金版本，由奥罗金最优秀的工匠所锻造。次要射击能发射出弩矢弹幕；每支弩矢都有可能造成 切割切割异常状态，爆头击杀则可加快装填速度。在被 Garuda 使用时，噬蛇弩会获得少量的穿透效果。

description.canonical: The max-velocity saw-launcher perfected. Features a larger magazine, faster fire rate, and a radial, slashing ricochet.
description.display: 完美打造的极速锯片发射器。具有更大的弹匣、更快的射速，以及可在一定范围内弹跳的锋利锯片。

description.canonical: The one who exalted Voruna to her Prime form imbued her signature sniper rifle with increased magazine size and ammo capacity, as if to arm her for a long hunt.
description.display: 将 Voruna 提升到 Prime 状态的人，也提升了她的标志性狙击步枪，增加了弹匣容量和弹药容量，仿佛是要让她做好长时间狩猎的准备。

description.canonical: Phantasma Prime is burnished with deadly force. In Revenant’s hands, it has increased magazine capacity. The might of its irradiated plasma is reminiscent of the fearsome Eidolon.
description.display: 幻离子 Prime 由死亡之力打磨而成。它在 Revenant 的手中，会拥有更多的弹匣容量。它的等离子照射光束所发出的威力，会让人不禁想起那令人生畏的夜灵。

description.canonical: Smite the unrighteous with Harrow Prime's signature speargun.
description.display: 用 Harrow Prime 的标志性标枪打击不义之徒。

description.canonical: Known for taking down whole squads with its single massive magazine, few weapons were as feared as the Prime Soma.
description.display: 以威猛的火力成功掠倒整支队伍而闻名，仅有少数武器能像月神 Prime 一样令人闻之丧胆。

description.canonical: Between measured staccato and staggering crescendo, Stradavar Prime never fails to call down a devastating finale.
description.display: 可在整齐的断奏和摇摆的渐强音之间自由切换，让斯特拉迪瓦 Prime 绝不错失任何一个给予毁灭终章的机会。

description.canonical: A classic shotgun design, embellished for the elite as only the Orokin could.
description.display: 只有奥罗金能为精英们打造出如此经典的霰弹枪设计。

description.canonical: Sleek and slender, a golden symbol of Tenno perfection.
description.display: 纤细而又熠熠生辉，象征着 Tenno 的至善至美。

description.canonical: Add lethal staccato percussion to Octavia's melodies with this masterpiece assault rifle.
description.display: 通过这件突击步枪大师之作来为 Octavia 的旋律添加致命的顿挫击打。

description.canonical: Art meets ingenuity with this beautifully deadly rifle.
description.display: 在这柄美丽而又致命的步枪里，艺术与精巧的设计不期而遇。

description.canonical: An artifact of exquisite beauty. A weapon of deadly purpose.
description.display: 既是精美的工艺品，也是致命的武器。

description.canonical: Sleek lines and golden accents define this masterpiece of the illustrious Entrati family.
description.display: 流畅的线条和金色的点缀定义了这件来自著名的英择谛家族的杰作。

description.canonical: Once thought destroyed, the newly uncovered Vectis Prime revives Tenno martial traditions.
description.display: 曾经一度认为已被消灭殆尽；这把新发现的守望者 Prime 还原了 Tenno 的武之传统。

description.canonical: Tenno artistry. Ancient craft. A weapon of surgical precision and devastating effect. Each bolt fired by Zhuge Prime explodes shortly after embedding.
description.display: Tenno 技艺。古老工艺。一把极为精确且富有破坏力的武器。诸葛连弩 Prime 的每支箭会在击中嵌入的瞬间爆炸。

description.canonical: This devastating automatic crossbow is the perfect marriage of ancient Earth weaponry and Tenno technology.
description.display: 这把毁灭性的自动连弩是古代地球军武与 Tenno 工艺完美结合的杰作。

description.canonical: Irradiate enemies with a continuous stream of deadly plasma. Charging secondary fire releases a glob of plasma that erupts with homing bomblets on impact. Increased Magazine Capacity when wielded by Revenant.
description.display: 用连续的致命等离子束照射敌人；次要攻击充能后可以释放出一团等离子球，球体碰撞时会产生多发制导的小型炸弹。在被 Revenant 使用时，该武器的弹匣容量会提升。

description.canonical: For the hunter, the apex of the sniper's art. For the hunted, a gateway to the next life.
description.display: 对猎人而言，这是狙击艺术的巅峰。对于猎物而言，这是通向来生的大门。

description.canonical: Using a barrage of rapid-fire plasma rockets, Gauss’ signature weapon lays down a path of destruction. Reloads are faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. For safety, rockets arm after traveling a safe distance.
description.display: 通过使用速射电浆火箭弹，Gauss 的标志性武器铺设了一条毁灭之路。冲刺时可以更快地装填弹匣，在 Gauss 手里效果更加显著。为了安全起见，火箭会在离开安全距离后爆炸。

description.canonical: A high-capacity, high-damage enforcer, this weapon can switch between the high crit semi-automatic and full automatic firing modes.
description.display: 一把兼具大容量弹匣和高伤害的杀器，这把武器可以在半自动和全自动开火模式间切换。

description.canonical: Launch a glaive that ricochets off surfaces in bursts of elemental damage, then perforate enemies with primary fire’s precision buck-shot. Damage increases with each Status Effect afflicting a target. Lavos will transmute a small portion of any ammo pickup to Primary Ammo when wielding his signature Cedo.
description.display: 发射能在表面弹跳并爆发出元素伤害的战刃，然后通过主要射击的精准鹿弹来击穿敌人。伤害会随着目标所受到的每个异常状态而增加。当 Lavos 持有他标志性的塞多时，他会将一小部分拾取到的任意弹药转化为主要武器弹药。

description.canonical: Unload percussive machine gun fire, or strike a heavy chord with a single charge shot. When Octavia wields her signature rifle alt-fire Headshot Kills have a chance to instantly refill the magazine.
description.display: 释放出强大冲击力的机枪炮火，或者用单发充能射击进行重和弦攻击。当 Octavia 使用她的标志性步枪时，由次要射击所造成的爆头击杀有几率立即装填弹匣。

description.canonical: Cyte-09's signature rifle is an ideal match for forceful gunners. A precisely timed reload increases reload speed and infuses the new magazine with Heat Damage.
description.display: Cyte-09 的标志性步枪是强力枪手的理想搭档。精确的装填可提高装填速度，并为下一个弹匣注入火焰伤害。

description.canonical: Blast enemies with glass slugs that devastate on impact. In Gara's hands, this signature weapon has a larger Ammo Pool.
description.display: 用玻璃弹头轰炸敌人，碰撞时将炸裂。当 Gara 手持这把的标志性武器时，其弹药上限会得到提升。

description.canonical: Deliver a massive punch with each blast of this shotgun, or launch a round that explodes mid-air knocking down nearby enemies.
description.display: 用这把霰弹枪打出沉重的一击，或者射出一发在空中爆炸的子弹来击倒附近的敌人。

description.canonical: Styanax’s speargun matches his might. Throw Afentis to pin an enemy and nearby enemies will also be stunned. Throw Afentis onto the ground to buff nearby allies with Ballistarii Might. The buff increases reload speed, fire rate, and ammo pools and reduces recoil. Allies who kill enemies with Ballistarii Might maintain the buff temporarily when they move away from Afentis.
description.display: Styanax 的标枪与他的力量相匹配。投掷圣英来压制敌人，其附近的敌人也会被击晕。将圣英投掷到地上，可创造一个为友军带来增益的炮兵威能力场，可增加装填速度，射速，弹药最大值，并降低后坐力。当获得炮兵威能的友军击杀敌人后，炮兵威能效果则会在他们离开圣英力场后继续维持一小段时间。

description.canonical: Turn the enemy's worst nightmare into reality with Follie's signature rifle. The Enkaus will instantly kill and dissolve inked enemies that are damaged at low health. Shooting inked enemies siphons ink back into the Enkaus, allowing for a constant flow of creative destruction.
description.display: 使用 Follie 的标志性步枪将敌人的噩梦化为现实。当被墨汁侵染的敌人生命值较低时，绘墨会瞬间将其击杀并溶解。射击被墨汁侵染的敌人可将墨水回流至绘墨，实现持续不断的创造性破坏。

description.canonical: A sturdy burst-rifle of considerable age and unknown origin collected by Teshin during his many years wandering the Origin System.
description.display: 这是 Teshin 在始源星系流浪多年期间收集的一把坚固的点射步枪，年代久远且来历不明。

description.canonical: This Tenno crafted, lever action rifle, is equal parts elegance and executioner.
description.display: 这支 Tenno 定制的扳杆式步枪是优雅的刽子手。

description.canonical: An energy projectile bursts forth from the Steflos and grows as it rushes toward enemies. The projectile's duration increases when it hits an enemy. When Citrine fires the Steflos, its projectile speed increases.
description.display: 石晶之花发射的能量弹会在飞向敌人时变大。当投射物击中敌人时，其飞行持续时间会增加。当 Citrine 使用石晶之花时，它的投射物速度会增加。

description.canonical: Quickly fire off a volley of deadly bolts with the Attica repeating crossbow.
description.display: 阿提卡连弩能够快速发射一片致命的弩矢弹幕。

description.canonical: Blast targets with corrosive plasma projectiles, or toss the scepter to inflict an energy field upon nearby enemies that amplifies their brain waves to attract bullets.
description.display: 用腐蚀性的等离子体轰炸目标，或是投出手杖用能量场增幅附近敌人的脑波，使其吸引子弹。
