description.canonical: Like a breath of wind, shots fired by this multi-barrel sniper are felt but never seen by its targets. Headshots in quick succession increase the Perigale's ammo efficiency. When the Perigale is wielded by Voruna, its ammo pool increases.
description.display: 就像一阵风，这把多管狙击枪发射的子弹能被它的目标感觉到，却从未被看到。快速连续爆头可提高月面狂风的弹药效率。当 Voruna 手持月面狂风时，它的弹药库会因此增加。

description.canonical: The Quellor was standard-issue to Dax Railjack crews of the Old War, dating back to the earliest, pre-Sigma craft. A rapid-fire assault rifle with a hefty magazine-size, the Quellor is an all-round workhorse. Also capable of large, short-range cryo-blasts.
description.display: 压制者是远古之战时禁卫航道星舰舰员的标准配置武器，其最早的铸造可追溯到西格玛系列之前。这是一种速射突击步枪，拥有较大的弹匣容量，是全能型的主战武器。而且也有着巨大的、短距离的冰冻冲击。

description.canonical: Precise calibration, rapid trigger-pull and a steady hand all combine to bring down the hardiest prey on two legs or four.
description.display: 结合精确校准、快速击发式扳机以及稳定持枪三项特点，打倒各种顽强的猎物。

description.canonical: This unusual automatic rifle feels strangely familiar and has two fire modes. Primary fire packs radiation damage. Alternate fire charges up to launch an explosive projectile.
description.display: 这把非同寻常的自动步枪给人一种奇异的熟悉感，并且拥有两种开火模式。主要射击附带辐射伤害，次要射击充能后可发射一枚爆炸投射物。

description.canonical: Make easy prey of enemies with this quiet, agile, and pinpoint accurate Tenno submachine gun.
description.display: 凭借着安静、灵敏及精准的特性，这把 Tenno 冲锋枪能轻易地猎杀敌人。

description.canonical: Strike with silent lightning or the pummeling drum of thunder. Alternate between stealthy short-range electrical discharge, and automatic lightning gun. Faster mode-switch when used by Wisp.
description.display: 用寂静或雷鸣般的闪电来攻击。可在隐秘的短距离放电和自动闪电枪两种模式中切换。在被 Wisp 使用时，武器的模式切换速度会更快。

description.canonical: The Latron Wraith is a powerful variation of the standard, semi-automatic rifle that features unique styling.
description.display: 拉特昂·亡魂是把变异版本的半自动步枪，拥有强大火力以及自己的独特外观。

description.canonical: The Scindo is a heavy war axe crafted by the Tenno. Reduced speed and agility is balanced by heavy, devastating strikes capable of connecting with multiple targets at once.
description.display: 分裂斩斧是由 Tenno 精心设计的重型战斧。减少速度和灵活性加强重量，破坏性的攻击能够一次杀伤多个目标。

description.canonical: Short axes held in each hand. High attack speed and can hit multiple targets. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.
description.display: 双手各为轴心挥砍。高攻速且能同时攻击多目标。高暴击几率。

description.canonical: The fast and brutal Dual Ichor axes will quickly tear through enemies with a high probability of inflicting Critical Damage.
description.display: 迅捷凶残的恶脓双斧能借由高几率的强力暴击快速撕裂敌人。

description.canonical: An ancient executioners weapon, the honor of decapitation by the Scindo Prime was reserved for the Orokin's most respected enemies.
description.display: 一把古老的刑具，只有那些最受奥罗金尊重的敌人才能享有被分裂斩斧 Prime 斩首的荣耀。

description.canonical: Voruna Prime's signature axe is adorned with Orokin gold. She personally ensured that the former owners would have no further use for it.
description.display: Voruna Prime 的标志性战斧装饰着奥罗金黄金。她亲自确保了这把战斧的前任主人不会再使用它。

description.canonical: Axes worthy of an executioner, refined to Orokin perfection.
description.display: 这是两把配得上行刑者的斧头，是奥罗金工艺登峰造极的体现。

description.canonical: Mete out the sharp pain of justice. Heavy Slam attacks create a vortex that pulls in lifted enemies when the Sarofang’s Combo Multiplier builds to 8x. In Voruna’s hands, the Sarofang only requires a 5x Combo Multiplier to summon the vortex.
description.display: 给予维持正义所带来的剧痛。当沙罗之牙的连击倍率达到 8 倍时，重型震地攻击会产生一个漩涡，将被举起的敌人卷入。在 Voruna 的手中，沙罗之牙只需要 5 倍的连击倍率就能召唤漩涡。

description.canonical: These coverings for the hands and feet allow devastating high flying hand-to-hand combat attacks without risking harm to the user.
description.display: 这些覆盖物装在使用者的手脚上，能让他们进行激烈又危险的肉搏战而不受到伤害。

description.canonical: Utilizing a new fighting stance, this Tenno weapon turns fists into claws and enemies into messy piles of meat and scrap metal.
description.display: 运用一种全新的战斗姿势，这把 Tenno 武器可以把拳头变为利爪，把敌人变成散乱的肉块及废铁。

description.canonical: A strong blade forged using ceramic.
description.display: 一把用陶瓷打造的强大长剑。

description.canonical: The Dakra Prime is a Tenno forged weapon, crafted during the time of the Orokin. It is renowned for speed, power and the ability to hit multiple targets.
description.display: 达克拉 Prime 是一把由 Tenno 锻造的武器，在奥罗金时代被制作出来，并且以其速度，威力跟多目标打击的能力著名。

description.canonical: This short blade weapon was built using ceramic. It has limited range but comes out fast.
description.display: 这把短剑使用陶瓷制造的。它的攻击范围有限但是却带来了高攻速。

description.canonical: This short blade weapon has limited range but comes out fast and can inflict fire damage.
description.display: 这把短剑攻击范围有限，但挥动速度快，同时可以造成火焰伤害。

description.canonical: This short blade weapon forged using dark metals has limited range but comes out fast.
description.display: 这把用黑暗金属锻造的短刃武器，在有限的范围内可以快速出招。

description.canonical: These matching stilettos have increased attack speed and can unleash a flurry of multi-hit attacks.
description.display: 这对纤细的短剑有着增强的攻速并且能发动旋风般的多重攻击。

description.canonical: A shorter version of the Ether blade that allows for a more focused attack on a single target.
description.display: 为了强化其对单体攻击而减短苍穹刀身的长度的苍穹。

description.canonical: A set of ceremonial daggers from the Orokin era, the Fang Prime's blades resonate violently as they strike. This allows them to pierce hardened materials like armor with ease.
description.display: 一组来自奥罗金时代的仪式匕首，狼牙 Prime 的攻击使刀片猛烈共振，这使得它们能够轻易刺穿坚硬材质如护甲。

description.canonical: Wielding a Kama in each hand brings a savage amount of 切割Slash Damage to bear against your enemies.
description.display: 两手各挥舞一把短柄战镰产生野蛮的切割切割伤害来对抗敌人。

description.canonical: The Kama is a Tenno style hatchet, capable of making short work of any foe.
description.display: 短柄战镰是一个 Tenno 风格的短柄斧，能够迅速击杀任何敌人。

description.canonical: Fast and precise. The Dual Ether cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing' infested allies. Capable of hitting multiple targets.
description.display: 迅速而精准。正因为苍穹双剑干净利落的斩击，使得 Tenno 认为它是「净化」受到感染的盟友时更慈悲的武器。苍穹双剑一次能击中复数敌人。

description.canonical: With a Heat Sword in each hand, enemies reach their fiery demise twice as fast. Can connect with multiple targets at once.
description.display: 每只手紧握一把烈焰之剑，双倍加强敌人在炽热中消亡的速度。能同时攻击多个目标。

description.canonical: A shorter Skana in each hand. Can hit multiple targets.
description.display: 每只手拿一把较短的空刃。能同时攻击多个目标。

description.canonical: These power gauntlets lack the range of most Melee Weapons, but Furax is far more devastating when you strike an enemy in close combat.
description.display: 这动力拳套较大部分近战武器距离更短，但在近战中表现更为优秀。

description.canonical: These Wraith gauntlets have been augmented for power.
description.display: 这些亡魂手套已经在力量上得到了强化。

description.canonical: These iron fists that rip through foes are Atlas' signature weapons. When wielded by Atlas they receive a Status Chance increase.
description.display: 这对铁拳的攻击能撕穿敌人，是 Atlas 的标志性武器。在被 Atlas 使用时，它们的触发几率会提升。

description.canonical: A pair of mighty gauntlets, the Ankyros were designed by the Tenno for close quarters combat. What they lack in range they make up for in speed.
description.display: 一对强大的拳套，甲龙双拳是由 Tenno 专为近身格斗所设计。牺牲攻击范围以换取更快的攻击速度。

description.canonical: This Orokin variation of the Ankyros is superior to its successor in every way.
description.display: 甲龙双拳的奥罗金版本，在各方面素质都远超其后继者。

description.canonical: The Kestrel boomerang is a heavy throwing weapon that can knock down enemies at a distance.
description.display: 红隼回旋镖是把重型投掷武器，可以击倒远处敌人。

description.canonical: Dating back to the time of the first Tenno, the Glaive is a uniquely deadly weapon. This multi-bladed disc is not only effective for melee combat; it can also be thrown like a boomerang to cut down enemies at a distance.
description.display: 在第一个 Tenno 的时代，战刃是一件奇怪而强大的武器。这多刀刃圆盘不单可用于近身战，更可如回力镖般使用，在一定距离外把敌人一分为二。

description.canonical: The Glaive Prime is a deadly and beautiful weapon from the Orokin era. The blades are as effective in close quarters as they are when thrown at distant enemies.
description.display: 战刃 Prime 在奥罗金时代是一把致命和优美的武器，其刀刃在近距离战斗时也与对远距离敌人掷出时一样有效。

description.canonical: With heightened agility and power the Kestrel Prime's heavy attacks easily knock down foes, ensuring none shall stand before it.
description.display: 凭借更高的敏捷性和力量，红隼 Prime 的重击可以轻松击倒敌人，所向披靡。

description.canonical: Turn foes into puppets with Teshin’s versatile throwing disc.
description.display: 使用 Teshin 灵活多变的飞盘将敌人变成你的提线木偶。

description.canonical: The heavy two-handed sword known as Gram requires great strength to wield, but it is notorious for its splitting power. Can hit multiple targets with each strike.
description.display: 这把名为格拉姆的大剑以其强大的斩击力令人闻风丧胆，需要巨力才可挥舞自如。其攻击可以击中多名敌人。

description.canonical: Makes sweeping cuts punctuated by bursts of heavy gunfire.
description.display: 在连续切砍之间夹杂重火力连发。

description.canonical: Deal double-bladed, double-barreled death with this primed gunblade.
description.display: 以这把 Prime 枪刃制造出双重刀刃、双重口径伤口的死亡。

description.canonical: Striking with massive twin blades, the Redeemer fires the killing blow with its built-in shotgun.
description.display: 救赎者能以巨大的双刃进行攻击，并用内建的霰弹枪造成致命一击。

description.canonical: A warrior who prefers brute force will make the most of Sampotes. Its Slams and Heavy Slams have an extended area of effect.
description.display: 喜欢蛮力的战士会充分利用三宝聚，它的震地攻击和重型震地攻击具有更广的影响范围。

description.canonical: Tear and maim with this agile, lightweight glass hammer. When Gara's wields her signature melee weapon, it gains additional Slam Radial Damage.
description.display: 用这把轻量灵活的玻璃锤来撕裂并残害目标。Gara 的标志性近战武器。在被 Gara 使用时，它会获得额外的震地范围伤害。

description.canonical: A large two-handed hammer, the Fragor requires great strength to wield, but impacts with enough force to send groups of enemies tumbling.
description.display: 巨大的双手锤，重击巨锤拥有能将复数敌人击飞的力量。

description.canonical: Ice in motion can crush mountains, this frozen hammer is no different.
description.display: 冰移可以碾碎山峰，这把冰锤的效果也是一样。

description.canonical: The signature weapon of the only lunatic fearsome enough to bust out of the Saturn Six Max-Pen. Once loosed this formidable throwing hammer always finds its way home.
description.display: 能逃脱出土星六号最高戒备监狱的唯一可怕狂人的标志性武器。一旦被解放，这把强大的战锤总是能找到回家的路。

description.canonical: This Heavy Scythe echoes battles of another time. It is far more a weapon of sheer force than one of finesse.
description.display: 这把重型镰刀呼应了另一个时代的战斗。其更像是一种纯粹的力量型武器，而不是一种技巧型武器。

description.canonical: The wrath of one who knows revenge is all about timing. Orion's signature Heavy Scythe.
description.display: 复仇之道，重在时机，此为深谙此语之人的怒火。Orion 的标志性重型镰刀。

description.canonical: The pride of one that knows their worth. Sirius' signature Heavy Scythe.
description.display: 知晓自身价值的人，自有傲骨。Sirus 的标志性重型镰刀。

description.canonical: A single blade for more precision. The Ether Sword cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing’ infested allies.
description.display: 苍穹之剑的斩切非常锐利，是一把精准的刀刃，被认为是 Tenno 用来清除受感染伙伴的慈悲武器。

description.canonical: Before all other weapons, Tenno master the Skana. This simple blade becomes immensely powerful in the hands of a master. For Tenno, it is the foundation of their fighting style and a pillar of their culture.
description.display: Tenno 在各种武器之中，最先精通的是空刃。其朴素的刀刃在他们手中是无比的强大。对Tenno 来说，这是他们战斗的基础以及文化的支柱。

description.canonical: A basic blade known as a Skana. It is widely used by the Tenno. Prime model offers slightly increased damage.
description.display: 一副被称为空刃的基础刀刃，受到 Tenno 广泛的使用。Prime 版本提供了更高一些的伤害。

description.canonical: The Magistar mace wields justice and truth in the form of bone-crushing blows.
description.display: 执法者钉锤以碎骨般的打击来执掌正义与真理。

description.canonical: With its lightning-fast strikes, the Ninkondi pays respect to the old ways.
description.display: 这把降灵追猎者凭借其迅如闪电的打击，充分体现了古老的战斗形式。

description.canonical: With these blazing fast nunchaku, the enemy will never know what hit them.
description.display: 这副双节棍挥动速度极快，敌人永远不会知道是被什么武器给击中。

description.canonical: Each kill with this swooping blade adds bonus damage to the Djinn Sentinel’s next Fatal Attraction ability. In turn, Fatal Attraction bestows the weapon with a period of 腐蚀Corrosive Damage.
description.display: 每次用这把俯冲样式的刀刃击杀会给引灵下一次释放的致命诱惑增加额外的伤害。作为回报，致命诱惑会赋予这把武器一段时间的 腐蚀腐蚀伤害。

description.canonical: Edun befits a dextrous warrior. Heavy Attack to throw Edun. Edun explodes after it is embedded in an enemy.
description.display: 雷石祭适合于机敏的战士。重击以投掷出雷石祭。 雷石祭在刺入敌人体内后便会爆炸。

description.canonical: During the darkest days of the Old War many a Tenno relied solely on the Tonbo to keep them alive.
description.display: 在远古之战中最黑暗的那几天中，许多 Tenno 仅能靠着蜻蛉薙生还下来。

description.canonical: Roll Koumei's die with every 30 hits from Amanata to empower yourself with 1 of 5 Koumei blessings. Roll a 6 to receive all blessings at once.
description.display: 天薙刀每命中敌人 30 次，就掷一次 Koumei 的骰子。掷出 1 到 5 的结果各赋予一种增益，而掷出 6 则一次性赋予所有增益。

description.canonical: The Tenno forged Orthos is a rare double bladed polearm. Those who take the time to master it speak of its impressive striking distance and ability to hit multiple targets.
description.display: 由 Tenno 所铸造的欧特鲁斯是把罕见的双刃长矛。对于投入时间掌握这把武器的人们总会谈起它令人印象深刻的攻击距离与群击能力。

description.canonical: That a god might reap a harvest of lives.
description.display: 收割生命之神。

description.canonical: Orthos Prime is an ancient Orokin martial weapon, forged from the purest Rubedo making it extremely light-weight.
description.display: 作为上古奥罗金的军用武器，欧特鲁斯 Prime 由最纯净的红化结晶制成，因而极其轻盈。

description.canonical: Harvest the enemy with this towering polearm.
description.display: 用这把如塔般耸立的长柄武器收割敌人。

description.canonical: Light and nimble, the twin blades of this polearm will swoop and slice through throngs of hardened foes.
description.display: 轻盈且灵巧。即使是防护严密的成群敌人，也会被这件长柄武器上的双刃所肢解。

description.canonical: The sensual lines of these golden Kamas have long been celebrated as a masterwork of Tenno weapon smithing.
description.display: 这对拥有迷人线条的金色短柄战镰，长久以来一直被奉为 Tenno 武器锻造的杰作。

description.canonical: A beautifully forged instrument of devastation.
description.display: 一把为了摧毁一切而锻造的终极兵器。

description.canonical: Deliver a golden knockout with these prime Melee Weapons.
description.display: 用这副 Prime 近战武器打出金色的击倒。

description.canonical: An ancient weapon imbued with a new truth.
description.display: 一把注入了新真理的古老武器。

description.canonical: A perfectly crafted pairing, this mace and shield combination is sculpted for exhibition but balanced for the battlefield.
description.display: 完美打造的一对，权杖与盾的组合不仅是为了展示而雕凿，也权衡了战场的用途。

description.canonical: As merciless and indestructible as Atlas Prime himself, Tekko Prime crush and split with tectonic force.
description.display: 如 Atlas Prime 自身一样无情且坚不可摧，铁钩手甲 Prime 通过地动之力粉碎并撕裂敌人。

description.canonical: Gleaming blades of white draw blood of the deepest red.
description.display: 拥有剃刀般切开敌人的锐利爪子。

description.canonical: The glorious original Orokin casting of Gara’s signature glass hammer. Deceptively light and swift, while remaining lethally effective.
description.display: 作为最初由奥罗金所铸造的辉煌，Gara 标志性的玻璃锤看似轻敏，却极具杀伤力。

description.canonical: With a blade forged from the same material as the Ether Sword, the Ether Reaper delivers quick death to its victims.
description.display: 采用与苍穹之剑相同材质来锻造刀身，让苍穹镰刀迅速的为受害者献上死亡。

description.canonical: Reap havoc with this full sized Tenno-crafted scythe.
description.display: 带来毁灭与收割生命的制式规格镰刀，由 Tenno 所锻造。

description.canonical: Fashioned from the willingly donated bone of the Sentient Ur-Hatho and embellished by Orokin luxurator Sembik Vol, Venato Prime was to be wielded against “common enemies” of the united peoples – had any ever emerged from the darkness beyond Tau.
description.display: (英文：VENATO PRIME) 由 Sentient Ur-Hatho 自愿捐献的骨骼打造，并由奥罗金奢华工匠森比克·沃尔精心装饰，脉纹 Prime 本应被用于对抗联盟的“共同敌人”——任何从 Tau 之外的黑暗中现身的人。

description.canonical: Reaper Prime is an ornamental scythe, with a blade forged from tempered Rubedo.
description.display: 收割者 Prime 是一把装饰用镰刀，带有以回火工艺处理过的红化结晶锻造的刀刃。

description.canonical: Hate is a scythe with a cruel blade, wielded by The Stalker.
description.display: 追猎者持有憎恨，这是一把残忍至极的镰刀。

description.canonical:
Harmony triumphs over hate. Heavy Attacks condense Status Effect damage into a single instance. Heavy Attack kills empower allies with increased Status Duration.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.
description.display:
和谐战胜憎恨。重击会立刻结算所有的异常状态效果伤害。使用重击击杀敌人可增强友军的触发时间。

当晚祷、歌颂与和谐一同奏响时，体验 Jade 之合奏真正的力量。

description.canonical: Razor sharp battle-hatchets, designed to compliment the Soma.
description.display: 这组锐利战斧是为了配合月神而设计的。

description.canonical: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.
description.display: 以 Grineer 材料制成，设计为海军陆战队使用，双头蛇是一把为了附带电击伤害而接受了大幅改造的传统棍棒武器——跳跃攻击附带电击伤害。可以同时打击多个敌人。

description.canonical: With its crescent shaped blades flying in sweeping arcs and striking at tremendous speed, the Tipedo demands focus from those wishing to unlock its true power.
description.display: 带有新月型刀刃的提佩多，能以弧形横扫飞舞并以惊人的高速进行攻击。使用者若想释放提佩多的真正威力，必须高度集中精神。

description.canonical: A classic Orokin weapon, Bo Prime creates elegant fury on the battlefield.
description.display: 一把经典奥罗金兵器，使用它以优雅的战姿横扫战场。

description.canonical: A lone Tenno once used this staff to fight back a horde of Infested.
description.display: 曾经有一名孤身一人的 Tenno 以这柄单手杖击退了一整个群落的感染者。

description.canonical: A two-handed, reinforced staff that can send multiple enemies airborne.
description.display: 双手强化长棍，它可以将敌人击飞。

description.canonical: With their final breath they look to the moon, and are gone.
description.display: 随着凝望月亮时呼出的最后一口气，就这样永久的消散了。

description.canonical: Scorch enemies with blistering blows, or set them ablaze with the flying fire disc.
description.display: 令敌人在炽烈的打击中焚灭，或用飞行的火盘将他们点燃。

description.canonical: Leverage bleeding-edge Granum tech with this massive heavy blade. Slam sends forth a cascading set of three shockwaves, while Heavy Slam unleashes a swath of shockwaves.
description.display: 这把重型巨刃使用了最前沿的格拉努科技。震地攻击会向前发射三道冲击波，而重型震地攻击则会发射大量冲击波。

description.canonical: Like the surge and crash of storm waves, a master of the Nami cutlass and Skyla dagger turns these two separate weapons into one fluid attack.
description.display: 像暴风雨的汹涌和破坏力一样，精通海波斯库拉对剑的人可以使用这两把不同的武器完成流畅的进攻。

description.canonical: Evoking the oceans of earth, this exquisite cutlass is a deadly work of art.
description.display: 唤起对地球上的海洋的记忆，这把精美的弯刀是一件致命的艺术品。

description.canonical: A blade forged using dark metals, capable of delivering innate 辐射Radiation Damage with attacks.
description.display: 一把使用暗黑金属制作的长剑，每次攻击都会附带辐射辐射伤害。

description.canonical: Use as a devastating heavy sword or apply a Dual Melee stance and split the weapon into two ferocious blades.
description.display: 能作为强大破坏力的重剑使用，或以近战双持架式将武器化为两把凶残的刀刃。

description.canonical: Syam is at home in the hands of a focused warrior. Its Heavy Attacks send forth shockwaves.
description.display: 业珀在专注的战士手中物尽其用。它的重击会发出冲击波。

description.canonical: Azothane calls the visionary warrior to turn the tides of battle. Block and melee attack at the same time to plunge Azothane into the ground, damaging nearby enemies with a shockwave and adding to the combo counter.
description.display: 溶灵尊会召唤出有远见的战士来扭转战局。同时进行格挡和近战攻击来将溶灵尊插入地面，用其冲击波伤害附近的敌人，并增加连击数。

description.canonical: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.
description.display: 这是 Lotus 为第一位从低温催眠中醒来的 Tenno 所准备的一份周年纪念礼物。

description.canonical: With massive charged power and the ability to hit up to five foes in a single swing, the Galatine sword is the heavy artillery of Melee Weapons.
description.display: 拥有强大蓄气攻击和一次攻击五名敌人的能力，迦伦提恩重剑可称为近身武器中的重炮。

description.canonical: A strong blade capable of inflicting 切割Slash Damage to its foes.
description.display: 其强力的刀刃能对敌人造成 切割切割伤害。

description.canonical: A blade with a serrated edge that delivers strong quick attacks.
description.display: 拥有锯齿状的刀刃，能够施以强力斩击。

description.canonical: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the eleventh anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.
description.display: 这是 Lotus 为第一位从低温催眠中醒来的 Tenno 所准备的一份 11 周年纪念礼物。

description.canonical: The Nikana reintroduces a lost Tenno blade and with it another fragment of the old ways.
description.display: 利用远古技艺重铸失传的 Tenno 刀刃，使侍刃武士刀重新展现。

description.canonical: The Dragon Nikana is forged from ancient Tenno steel. This is a master's weapon, only the most worthy of Tenno may wield it.
description.display: 龙之侍刃是以古代 Tenno 特制的钢铁所铸成。这是大师的武器，只有武艺修为能与之相配的 Tenno 能使用它。

description.canonical: Once the blade weapon of choice for an exclusive order of Tenno assassins, the Karyst dagger grew to become a symbol of honor and duty for all Tenno.
description.display: 这曾是一个门第严格的 Tenno 刺客工会的特制武器，凯洛斯特匕首后来渐渐成为了所有 Tenno 的荣耀与使命的象征。

description.canonical: The sword the fabled Orokin executioner Nihil used to glass the condemned. Swing while Aim Gliding to glass enemies. A Ground Slam will smash nearby glassed foes, while sending forward a narrow shockwave to shatter distant ones. A Heavy Slam sends forth a wider shockwave with greater force.
description.display: 传说中的奥罗金行刑者无刹，用这把剑来将犯人玻璃化。在飞身瞄准时挥动攻击可以使敌人玻璃化。震地攻击将击碎附近玻璃化的敌人，同时向前放出一道冲击窄波，来击碎远处的敌人。重型震地攻击则会放出威力更大且更宽的冲击波。

description.canonical: A unique blade used by an old Tenno clan.
description.display: 古老 Tenno 氏族所使用的独特刀刃​​。

description.canonical: An advanced blade that delivers high-damage attacks. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.
description.display: 这是一把先进的武器，有着高蓄力伤害和暴击几率。

description.canonical: Take mastery to the next level with this primed rapier.
description.display: 用这把 PRIME 细剑将对技巧的掌握提升至更高等级。

description.canonical: The hunted will meet a quick end when faced with Khora Prime's signature swords. Heavy Attack Efficiency is enhanced when wielded by Khora.
description.display: 当猎物面对 Khora Prime 的标志性双刀时，生命将迅速终结。Khora 挥舞双刀时，其重击效率会被增强。

description.canonical: Only Tenno were strong enough to wield this noble beast of a weapon.
description.display: 只有 Tenno 才足以运用这把高尚野兽般的武器。

description.canonical: Born anew, the father of swords returns.
description.display: 全然新生，诸剑之祖已经回归。

description.canonical: This master blade is the heavier, oversized and far more lethal version of the signature weapon of an extinct order of Tenno assassins.
description.display: 作为一群已绝迹的 Tenno 刺客的标志性武器，这把大师之刃比原版显得更厚重、更大，以及更为致命。

description.canonical: An ancient blade predating the fall of the Orokin Empire. Forged using techniques lost over the centuries, the edge remains sharper than that of any modern Nikana.
description.display: 远在奥罗金帝国灭亡之前即存在的古老刀刃。以失落的技术所锻冶之刀锋，至今仍比当代各型侍刃来的锐利。

description.canonical: A greatsword for those with an insatiable hunger for victory. Grendel is immune to crowd-control when he performs Heavy Attacks with this weapon.
description.display: 为那些渴求胜利的人所打造巨剑。当 Grendel 使用这把武器进行重击时，他能够免疫群体控制技能。

description.canonical: Forged by a forgotten master, these exquisite blades are bounty from a golden-age long gone.
description.display: 由一位被遗忘的大师所锻造，这对精致的刀刃是来自那早已消失的黄金时代的财宝。

description.canonical: Enforce authority with these fine-edged sai blades.
description.display: 通过这些精细的双叉锋刃彰显权力。

description.canonical: A classic Tenno blade, beautifully reimagined.
description.display: Tenno 的经典剑刃，经过精美重制。

description.canonical: Tatsu Prime glows with spectral splendor. It grows more powerful with each enemy’s demise, especially when wielded by Revenant.
description.display: 龙辰 Prime 闪着幽光。每一个刀下亡魂都会让它的光更闪耀，尤其是在为 Revenant 所用的时候。

description.canonical: The blade of the world-destroyer reaches its apotheosis, severing conflict itself. In forging this weapon, you have brought unrealized dreams to their ultimate conclusion.
description.display: 灭世之刃终于完成升华，锋芒所至，连战争与冲突本身都被斩断。锻造此武器的同时，你也让那些未能实现的梦想迎来了最终的结局。

description.canonical: Tear through any target with these vicious, claw-like blades. The signature swords of Khora.
description.display: 用这恶毒的爪状刀片撕开任何目标。Khora 的标志性刀剑。

description.canonical: Forged for veterans of the Scarlet Spear conflict, this Lacera has been modified to enhance nimbleness and lethality.
description.display: 这款专为参与猩红之矛战役的老将所打造的悲痛之刃，经过了改造以提高敏捷性和杀伤力。

description.canonical: In the practiced hands of a master, this blade and whip becomes exceedingly devastating.
description.display: 在熟练的大师手中，这把剑鞭极具毁灭性。

description.canonical: The Stalker's sword as bestowed on him by the Sentient Hunhow.
description.display: 这把追猎者的剑是 Hunhow 赐予给他的。

description.canonical: A fragment of Stalker's War sword, a symbol of his defeat.
description.display: 追猎者的战争之剑的碎片，是其落败的象征。

description.canonical: Perforate enemies with these two needle-sharp sai.
description.display: 用这把两端带有尖刺的十手来刺穿敌人。

description.canonical: The delicate form of this Tenno rapier conceals its ferocious and resilient force.
description.display: 这把 Tenno 细剑的精巧外形让它的凶猛而富有弹性的力量藏而不露。

description.canonical: Tear and chew through enemies with this unusual crankshaft-style greatsword. When wielded by Grendel he is immune to staggers and knockdowns during heavy attacks.
description.display: 用这把不寻常的，曲轴风格巨剑撕破并嚼碎敌人的骨肉。在 Grendel 的控制下，他在进行重击时不会受到失衡和击倒的影响。

description.canonical: After 10 kills or assists, Dorrclave enters a spectral state that doubles weapon Follow Through and guarantees Status Effects for the next 10 attacks. In Dagath's hands, each active Status Effect heals her slightly.
description.display: 在 10 次击杀或助攻后，怒斩进入光谱状态，使得武器伤害穿透系数加倍，并且接下来的 10 次攻击必定造成异常状态。如果是 Dagath 使用，每个激活的状态效果都会轻微治疗她。

description.canonical: Elevate martial combat into an art form with this Tenno rapier.
description.display: 用这把 Tenno 细剑以艺术的方式来提升武术战斗技巧。

description.canonical: The steel flag of Old War Railjack crews, the Pennant was invaluable in repelling boarders. With each heavy attack kill the Pennant's speed of attack increases.
description.display: 远古之战航道星舰舰员的钢铁旗帜。这个尖幡在击退登舰敌人时十分有用。每一个重击击杀都会提高尖幡的攻击速度。

description.canonical: Fearsome and noble, the elegant two-handed Nikana is the pride of any Arsenal. Kills build charges and seeking projectiles are unleashed with a Slide Attack to find and stun unwitting enemies. When Revenant wields this blade, Tatsu's charge cap is increased.
description.display: 尊贵而令人畏惧，这把优雅的双手侍刃是任何军械库里的骄傲。击杀可以蓄能，而在施展滑行攻击时，积蓄的能量会转化为投射物，追踪并击晕那些浑然不觉的敌人。在被 Revenant 使用时，龙辰的蓄能次数上限会得到提升。

description.canonical: Forged of steel grafted from Umbra's flesh, this elegant Nikana unites with its Warframe to form a single being of seething purpose.
description.display: 这把优雅的侍刃从 Umbra 肉体移植的钢材锻造而成，并与其战甲结合形成拥有沸腾意志的整体。

description.canonical: Argo & Vel bolster the warrior who stands fast. Its Heavy Attack sends forth a glaive that ricochets off enemies.
description.display: 星舟 & 帆为坚守阵地的战士提供支持。它的重击会射出一把会在敌人身上弹开的刀刃。

description.canonical: This fiery sword and shield combination perfects the balance of Tenno offense and defense prowess. In the hands of a Master, even a defensive tool like a shield can be used as a weapon.
description.display: 这一火焰般的剑盾组合使 Tenno 的攻击与防御技艺取得完美的平衡。在大师的手中，就连盾牌这样的防御工具也能被用作武器。

description.canonical: Take active defense to new heights with this deadly flying shield and brutal blade. Throw the shield with a unique Heavy Attack, inflicting Blast Status Effects and dealing damage in a wide area.
description.display: 这套残暴而致命的剑盾组合完美展示了最好的防守就是进攻。通过独特的重击可投掷出盾牌，造成爆炸异常状态和大范围伤害。

description.canonical: Baruuk's signature weapons: a sword for retribution, a shield for restraint. In Baruuk's hands, and his hands only, Cobra's first strike in a combo renders his foe unconscious.
description.display: Baruuk 的标志性武器：代表报应的剑，以及象征克制的盾。唯有在 Baruuk 的手中，眼镜蛇招式中的第一次打击可使敌人失去意识。

description.canonical: Punish those who test your restraint. The first strike in a combo stuns enemies when Cobra & Crane Prime are wielded by Baruuk.
description.display: 向那些考验你克制力的人施予惩罚。在被 Baruuk 使用时，眼镜蛇 & 鹤 Prime 连击中的第一击可以眩晕敌人。

description.canonical: Deadly slashes from the Sigma sword are matched only by the force of the Octantis shield when thrown from the air.
description.display: 西格玛剑的致命切砍唯有南极座空中掷出的力量能与之匹敌。

description.canonical: An intimidating Tonfa set designed to match the briary design of the Boltor.
description.display: 一对设计成与满身尖刺为造型的螺钉步枪相辅相成的拐刃，有着令人生畏的外观。

description.canonical: The Kronen resurrects a lethal fighting style once thought lost to the ages.
description.display: 皇家拐刃重现了一度被认为已失落于长久岁月中的致命战斗风格。

description.canonical: Ancient blades, perfected for today’s combat.
description.display: 远古之刃，但完美契合今日的战斗。

description.canonical: Command the beauty and lethality of these ornate warfans.
description.display: 让这对华丽的武扇彰显其绝美的杀伤力。

description.canonical: Wield Xaku Prime’s elegant fan, its gilded edges crafted for both precision and prestige.
description.display: 挥舞着 Xaku Prime 的优雅扇子，它的镀金边缘尽显精密与尊贵。

description.canonical: Flick away the enemy with this heavy warfan. The Quassus scatters ethereal daggers that are even more deadly accurate when wielded by Xaku.
description.display: 用这把重型武扇拂开敌人。威震武扇会散射出轻巧的匕首，在 Xaku 的挥舞下将更为致命精准。

description.canonical: Unfurl this warfan like a rapidly waxing moon.
description.display: 展开这把武扇，就如一弯快速升起的上弦月。

description.canonical: Lacerate attackers with two razor sharp warfans.
description.display: 用两把带有锐利剃刀的军扇来撕碎攻击者。

description.canonical: Each lash of Oraxia's whip injects its victim with a dose of deadly toxin. Upon death, afflicted enemies have a chance to burst, damaging nearby enemies and spreading the poison.
description.display: Oraxia 的每一次鞭打都会将致命毒素注入敌人体内，受影响的敌人死亡时爆发毒素，对附近的敌人造成伤害并扩散毒素。

description.canonical: The Furis delivers a high damage output in a short time frame thanks to its high rate of fire.
description.display: 盗贼是一把自动手枪，这小东西拥有极高的射速。

description.canonical: Infused with rare Orokin alloys, the Bronco Prime is a highly efficient weapon, trading an increased Magazine Capacity and damage for a lower rate of fire.
description.display: 加入罕见的奥罗金合金，野马 Prime 是一把高效能武器，以射速为代价，提高装弹量和伤害力。

description.canonical: The Sicarus fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of auto-pistols and the accuracy of semi-automatic pistols.
description.display: 暗杀者是三发点射手枪，在连发手枪的杀伤力和单发手枪的准确度之间取得平衡。

description.canonical: The Bolto fires slow, heavy bolts that are capable of impaling enemies to walls.
description.display: 螺钉手枪连射速度缓慢，大型的螺钉能把敌人钉在墙上。

description.canonical: The Bronco is a small-scale shotgun that can be wielded with one hand. Only effective at close range, it has a limited Magazine Capacity.
description.display: 野马是可以单手操作的小型霰弹枪。在近距离有效但弹匣容量较少。

description.canonical: The Lex is a powerful, accurate pistol that has a low Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity. Very efficient at long range.
description.display: 雷克斯是大火力的手枪，射速和弹匣容量都很低，但每发伤害很高。

description.canonical: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere. Prime model offers slightly increased damage.
description.display: 拉托是半自动手枪。其高精度深受 Tenno 喜爱。PRIME 版本拥有稍高的伤害。

description.canonical: A special version of the standard Lato pistol with a slower Fire Rate but offering higher Accuracy and Damage values. The Lato Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the grips.
description.display: 拉托的特别版，射速略低但伤害和精准度更高。拉托·破坏者被 Tenno 定制成蓝绿色金属光泽，并在握把上绘制了 Lotus 纹样。

description.canonical: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere.
description.display: 拉托是一款被 Tenno 广泛使用的高精度手枪。

description.canonical: Steady and reliable, the Vasto revolver combines speed and power for a classic gunslinger feel.
description.display: 稳定、可靠。这把瓦斯托左轮手枪结合了速度与力量，呈现出经典的神枪手意象。

description.canonical: Never stop fighting, never run out of ammo. Temple's signature machine pistol was modified by Albrecht Entrati to warp fired bullets back into the magazine when reloaded.
description.display: 弹药无穷无尽，战斗至死方休。Temple 的标志性连发手枪经过阿尔布雷希特·英择谛的改造，装填时，被消耗的子弹会重新回到弹匣中。

description.canonical: Banshee Prime's signature shotgun is an instrument of devastation that fires both focused and broad shots.
description.display: Banshee Prime 的标志性霰弹枪是把可射出集中和散射子弹的破坏性武器。

description.canonical: The Ballistica crossbow features a unique dual firing mechanism. Choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot.
description.display: 这把布里斯提卡连弩采用独特的双击发装置，可在四连发或蓄力使用精准的致命射击之间选择。

description.canonical: Hammer the enemy with this light-bodied heavy hitter. Featuring a double-action trigger that fires hard and fast.
description.display: 用这把轻盈的重击手猛击敌人。具有复动式扳机，可以快速、猛烈地发射。

description.canonical: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.
description.display: 这是 Lotus 为第一位从低温催眠中醒来的 Tenno 所准备的一份周年纪念礼物。

description.canonical: The choice weapon of Mirage, these fast-firing dual pistols deliver a deadly performance.
description.display: 作为 Mirage 的精选武器，这些高射速的双手枪将为您带来一场致命的演出。

description.canonical: The versatile Magnus revolver is a lethal sidearm for any Tenno.
description.display: 多功能麦格努斯左轮手枪对于任何 Tenno 来说都是一把能置对手于死地的手枪。

description.canonical: Vanquish chaos with dual firepower.
description.display: 以双重火力征服混乱。

description.canonical: Wield a golden pair of rocket launchers. Sprint to reload them faster. They reload fastest when wielded by Gauss.
description.display: 挥舞一对金色火箭发射器。冲刺时可以拥有更快的装填速度。搭配 Gauss 使用时，其装填速度更快。

description.canonical: Gilded rails adorn these two vicious bolt launching pistols.
description.display: 镀金的导轨装饰着这对凶猛的钉枪。

description.canonical: Precision machined mirrored pistols. Primed and ready.
description.display: 精密加工的镜像手枪。填装完毕并蓄势待发。

description.canonical: The elegant Aksomati precisely refined to this, their ultimate manifestation.
description.display: 优雅的轻灵月神双枪精准定义了它们的终极表现。

description.canonical: Stylish, discreet and accurate, perfect for the Tenno of distinction.
description.display: 时尚、稳定而精准，非常适合那些喜欢与众不同的 Tenno 们。

description.canonical: Unleash the song of the righteous warrior with this gilded pistol that goes into Overdrive on headshot kills, maximizing fire rate and ammo efficiency for a short time.
description.display: 用这把镀金手枪释放正义战士的怒吼，爆头击杀后即可进入超负荷模式，短时间内大幅提升射速和弹药效率。

description.canonical: The beauty of this luxuriously gilded crossbow cannot obscure its lethal purpose.
description.display: 这款豪华镀金连弩的精美无法遮掩它致命的目的。

description.canonical: Send shivers down your enemies' spines with this wrist-mounted sidearm. As the signature weapon of Sevagoth Prime, it deals additional headshot damage when wielded by him.
description.display: 这把腕式次要武器让你的敌人不寒而栗。作为 Sevagoth Prime 的标志性武器，由他使用时可造成额外的爆头伤害。

description.canonical: Versatile weapons complement deadly hunters. Khora Prime’s signature pistol rotates through hot, cold, electric, and toxic quills. When equipped on Khora, Hystrix Prime has a chance to instantly reload after headshots.
description.display: 灵活多变的武器与致命的猎人相得益彰。Khora Prime 的标志性手枪可在火焰、冰冻、电击和毒素刺镖中轮换。当 Khora 装备上豪猪 Prime 并造成爆头时，则弹药有几率立即重新装填。

description.canonical: Ring a funeral toll upon enemy skulls with Harrow Prime's signature pistol.
description.display: 用 Harrow Prime 的标志性手枪在敌人的头颅上敲响葬礼的钟声。

description.canonical: Glinting like a golden dawn, Yareli Prime’s signature pistol engulfs foes in a cascade of virulent, explosive, water globules. None can escape the sea.
description.display: Yareli Prime 的标志性手枪闪耀着金色黎明般的光芒，将敌人吞噬在一连串的剧毒、爆炸性水弹中。没有人能逃出这片水域。

description.canonical: The Lex Prime is a powerful, accurate pistol that has a low Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity. Very efficient at long range.
description.display: 雷克斯 Prime 是一把强大且精准的手枪，虽然有着射速慢和弹匣小的缺点，但在远距离作战时非常出色。

description.canonical: Orokin elegance meets formidable stopping power in this exquisite revolver. Hits have a chance to maximize Ammo Efficiency for a few seconds.
description.display: 奥罗金的优雅与强大制动力在这把精致的左轮手枪中相遇。命中时有几率在数秒内最大化弹药效率。

description.canonical: Pound the beat for a dance of death with Octavia's signature prime pistol.
description.display: 以这把 Octavia 的标志性 Prime 手枪，为死亡之舞敲奏节拍。

description.canonical: Three kills in rapid succession to summon a second ethereal Pyrana for twice the deadly punch.
description.display: 快速地连续 3 次击杀将召唤一把食人鱼的幻影，造成双倍的致命杀伤。

description.canonical: The Sicarus Prime is an ornamental firearm that fires rounds in rapid bursts, providing a balance between the lethality of auto-pistols and the accuracy of semi-automatic pistols.
description.display: 暗杀者 PRIME 是一把快速点射的装饰性武器，在连发手枪的杀伤力和单发手枪的准确度之间取得平衡。

description.canonical: Orokin craftsmanship married with superior firepower. Dual Vastos, primed and ready to strike.
description.display: 奥罗金精湛工艺与出众火力的结合。两把瓦斯托，已经装弹待发。

description.canonical: This elegant rapid-fire revolver is the embodiment of superior Orokin craftsmanship.
description.display: 这把优雅的速射左轮手枪，正是奥罗金卓越工艺设计的体现。

description.canonical: This sidearm’s circular design evokes Protea Prime’s perception of time.
description.display: 这把次要武器的圆形设计唤起了 Protea Prime 对时间的感知。

description.canonical: A thousand pains, before their end.
description.display: 在他们临终之前，使其受尽千般痛苦。

description.canonical: A lightweight weapon that packs a punch worthy of its golden design.
description.display: 看似轻巧的武器，却有着与其金色设计相称的巨大威力。

description.canonical: Heat, cold, electricity, or toxin: choose an element and launch a flurry of deadly quills. This versatile sidearm is Khora’s signature weapon and has a chance to instantly reload after headshots when she wields it.
description.display: 火焰、冰冻、电击或者毒素：选择一种元素并发射出一簇簇致命的刺镖。这款灵活多变的次要武器是 Khora 的标志性武器。当她使用豪猪时，爆头有几率使弹药重新装填。

description.canonical: Bombard legions of enemies with target seeking rockets. These dual launchers reload faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. Rockets arm after reaching a safe distance.
description.display: 使用目标追踪火箭弹轰击成群的敌人。冲刺时可以更快地装填弹匣，在 Gauss 手里效果更加显著。火箭会在离开安全距离后爆炸。

description.canonical: Chew through the enemy with this vicious automatic hand shotgun.
description.display: 用这把凶恶的自动霰弹手枪咬穿敌人。

description.canonical: The devastating power of the Soma rifle compacted into two elegant pistols.
description.display: 月神步枪的强大威力被凝聚在这对优雅的手枪当中。

description.canonical: This intricate automatic pistol is able to fire its magazine which then spins in the air for a short time, firing lasers at nearby enemies.
description.display: 这把构造错综复杂的自动手枪能射出其弹匣，同时在空中旋转的弹匣短时间内会击发激光攻击附近的敌人。

description.canonical: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.
description.display: 这对小巧，能快速击发的史提托全自动手枪，其恰如其分的尺寸既能双持射击又不失精准度。

description.canonical: The design of these hard-hitting dual pistols is a mix of organic and bladed elements.
description.display: 这组重击双手枪的设计是有机体和刀片元素的结合。

description.canonical: Octavia's pistol hammers foes with single shots or a rapid volley of bullets. When wielded by Octavia, alt-fire Headshot Kills increase Reload Speed.
description.display: Octavia 的手枪以单发或迅速齐发的方式将子弹打入敌人体内。在被 Octavia 使用时，由次要射击所造成的爆头击杀会提升装填速度。

description.canonical: Fires razor-sharp darts that anchor themselves in their target before erupting in a plume of toxic gas.
description.display: 可以发射如剃刀般锋利的飞镖固定在目标上，接着喷发出一股有毒气体。

description.canonical: Reverse-engineered from propulsion tech this hand-cannon packs a kick. Weak Point kills trigger Overdrive, locking off secondary functions while maximizing your fire rate and ammo efficiency for a short time.
description.display: 这款强力手枪由喷射推进器技术逆向设计而成。弱点击杀会触发超载状态，该状态将禁用次要射击，并在短时间内最大化你的射速和弹药效率。

description.canonical: With a high fire rate, ammo efficiency and rapid reload when emptied, this unusual sidearm can hand out carnage all day long. Ammo efficiency is further increased when Protea uses this, her signature weapon.
description.display: 在高射速、高弹药效率以及高装填速度的加持下，这把非比寻常的次要武器能昼夜无休地大杀四方。作为 Protea 的标志性武器，弹药效率会在 Protea 使用它时更进一步地提升。

description.canonical: Ring the death knell. Headshots briefly turn this scoped pistol into a rapid-fire, Critical Damage fiend that uses no ammo. When used by Harrow, Knell has a 2-round mag.
description.display: 鸣响死神的丧钟。爆头射击短暂地将这把带瞄准镜的手枪变成快速击发，不消耗弹药的暴击伤害恶魔。在被 Harrow 使用时，丧钟会拥有双发弹匣。

description.canonical: Sevagoth's wrist-mounted sidearm fires a chilling slow-moving slab, guaranteed to slow enemies for easier marksmanship. Charge the shot to fire a punishing high-velocity, high critical chance slab that punches through barriers. Deals additional headshot damage in Sevagoth's hands.
description.display: Sevagoth 的腕式次要武器可以发射令人胆寒的慢速移动石板，石板可以减缓敌人的速度，以更轻松地瞄准敌人。蓄力射击可发射一个惩戒性的高速、高暴击几率的石板，石板可击穿障碍物。在 Sevagoth 手中可造成额外的爆头伤害。

description.canonical: Launch a volley of virulent, hyper-pressurized, water globules that envelope targets and explode with torrential force. Yareli's signature pistol.
description.display: 发射一连串的剧毒高压水弹，包围目标并剧烈爆炸。Yareli 的标志性手枪。

description.canonical: The Boltor fires slow, heavy bolts that are capable of impaling enemies to walls.
description.display: 螺钉步枪所发射出的的慢速重型螺钉足以将敌人钉在墙上。

description.canonical: A classic Orokin weapon, Braton Prime features modified damage levels and a larger magazine over the standard model.
description.display: 一把经典的  奥罗金兵器，布莱顿 Prime 比起标准版，强化了伤害能力以及更大的弹匣。

description.canonical: The Burston fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of automatic rifles and the accuracy of semi-automatic rifles.
description.display: 伯斯顿是三发点射步枪，在机枪的杀伤力和半自动的准确度之间取得平衡。

description.canonical: The Gorgon sports a large magazine that allows it to provide suppressing fire and sustain a high damage rate over a long time. Its high Fire Rate is only achieved following a short wind-up cycle.
description.display: 蛇发女妖是一把重机枪。巨大的弹匣使它能够提供压制火力并长时间维持高伤害率。

description.canonical: The ornamental Latron Prime exploits ancient Orokin technology to get a slight damage increase over the standard Latron.
description.display: 这把经过装饰的拉特昂 Prime 利用了远古的奥罗金技术，拥有比标准版拉特昂还高的伤害。

description.canonical: The Braton's high rate of fire and accuracy make it a favorite among the Tenno.
description.display: 布莱顿是一支自动步枪。高射速和高精度使其成为了 Tenno 的最爱。

description.canonical: The Latron is a highly efficient rifle that performs well at medium and at long range, its accuracy making it a deadly weapon in the hands of skilled marksmen.
description.display: 拉特昂是一支半自动步枪。其高性能和高准确性令它在一名能精准射击的人手中时可以变得十分致命。

description.canonical: Manufactured by the Corpus, the Snipetron is a powerful and accurate rifle that sports optical zoom capabilities. Perfect for long range engagements.
description.display: 由 Corpus 加工，狙击特昂是一把具备变焦能力的强力精准步枪。适合远距离战斗。

description.canonical: The MK1-Braton is the standard issue rifle for all Tenno. A versatile weapon that can be customized to support a wide variety of play styles.
description.display: MK1-布莱顿是 Tenno 的标准配置步枪，是一把可被定制化以支援各种使用风格的多功能武器。

description.canonical: Accuracy coupled with a massive magazine makes the Soma assault rifle a formidable weapon.
description.display: 高准度与高容量弹匣的结合，使月神突击步枪成为强大的武器。

description.canonical: A classic Tenno sniper rifle, the Vectis is ideal for ranged takedowns.
description.display: 守望者是把适于远距击杀敌人的理想武器，一把 Tenno 的经典狙击步枪。

description.canonical: A customized version of the elusive Snipetron, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.
description.display: 这把狙击特昂是少见的定制化版本，拥有金属质感及莲花徽记。

description.canonical: A special version of the standard Braton rifle with a slower Fire Rate but offering higher accuracy and damage values. The Braton Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the grips.
description.display: 布莱顿的特别版本，有着较低的射速，但更高的精准度和伤害。布莱顿·破坏者被 Tenno 定制成蓝绿色金属光泽，并在握把上绘制了 Lotus 纹样。

description.canonical: Sobek is a rapid-firing Grineer shotgun that has reduced damage per shot but boasts extra large magazine capacity.
description.display: 鳄神是一把速射型 Grineer 霰弹枪，虽降低每一枪的伤害，但拥有超大弹匣容量。

description.canonical: A shotgun with low accuracy and strong recoil, but able to deliver its payload in full-auto. The Boar is best used at close range.
description.display: 野猪有着较低的精度和大后坐力，但可以全自动发射载弹。最适宜近距离使用。

description.canonical: One of the finest examples of Tenno craftsmanship, the Boar Prime offers a higher Fire Rate, Magazine Capacity and a much higher per-shot damage.
description.display: Tenno 工艺设计的绝佳案例之一，野猪 Prime 能提供更快的射速、更大的弹匣容量，以及更高的子弹伤害。

description.canonical: The Hek is a powerful shotgun that fires its shots with a tight spread, making it efficient at medium range as long as its strong recoil is properly managed.
description.display: 海克是一把能发射密集弹丸的强力霰弹枪，只要能驾驭其猛烈后坐力，在中距离战斗也能有效发挥。

description.canonical: The Strun is a standard shotgun. Reliable, versatile and deadly.
description.display: 斯特朗是一把标准的霰弹枪，可靠，灵活，致命。

description.canonical: A different take on a familiar shotgun, the Strun Wraith features unique styling.
description.display: 熟知霰弹枪截然不同的造型，斯特朗·亡魂拥有着相当特殊的风格。

description.canonical: Silently lacerate enemies with Gara's signature glass throwing knives. Increased Projectile Speed when wielded by Gara.
description.display: 无声地以 Gara 的标志性玻璃飞刀撕裂敌人。在被 Gara 使用时，该武器的投射物飞行速度会提升。

description.canonical: Kunai throwing daggers offer a silent alternative to the traditional side arm. Perfect for assassins.
description.display: 苦无以投掷用匕首替代传统次要武器的非静音攻击。暗杀首选。

description.canonical: A flash of red ribbon is the last thing most victims of these throwing-daggers see.
description.display: 彤红缎带的残影，是这款投掷匕首刃下大多数受害者最后看到的影像。

description.canonical: These rare, braided throwing daggers were a favorite tool of high ranking Orokin assassins.
description.display: 配置这些罕见的投掷匕首，是奥罗金高阶刺客喜欢的工具。

description.canonical: As deadly as any bullet without the associated noise or commotion.
description.display: 如同任何子弹一样致命，且不会引起噪音或骚动。

description.canonical: Used by The Stalker, Despair throwing blades have a mono-filament edge, sharp enough to penetrate a Warframe.
description.display: 追猎者所持的绝望，是丢出由单分子构成的刀刃，足够锋利来穿透战甲。

description.canonical: The remotely triggered Castanas quietly deliver a lethal dose of electricity to unsuspecting enemies.
description.display: 可远程遥控的雷爆信镖会悄悄传递致死剂量的电力给毫无戒备的敌人。

description.canonical: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.
description.display: 作为苦无的替代方案，飞扬用较低的伤害换得更高的携带量跟更快的射速。

description.canonical:
In moments of despair, let the battle resonate with song. Cantare's blades lodge into the battlefield and return upon reload. When returning blades strike enemies, Cantare empowers allies with increased Reload Speed.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.
description.display:
在绝望的时刻，让歌声响彻战场。歌颂的刃片会扎入战场中，并在重新装填时返回。当返回的刃片击中敌人时，歌颂会增强友军的装填速度。

当晚祷、歌颂与和谐一同奏响时，体验 Jade 之合奏真正的力量。

description.canonical: Go on the hunt with Oraxia’s signature secondary. Fling a volley of toxin-laced barbs, or drop a cluster snare that scatters on impact, seizing nearby enemies and dragging them together.
description.display: 使用 Oraxia 的标志性次要武器进行狩猎。你可以射出一连串充满毒素的倒钩，或者投放一个在撞击时散开的团状陷阱，抓住附近的敌人并将其拖到一起。

description.canonical: The claws of these tactical bombs dig into the target and detonate on command.
description.display: 附带的尖锐勾爪能将战术炸弹掘入目标体内并遥控引爆。

description.canonical: The Felarx invokes ancient times when aristocrats hunted game. For ceremonies, Orokin elites bred creatures reminiscent of game birds to reanimate cultural myths. They gave the Zariman crew Felarx and a brace of birds as a sign of acceptance into elite society. The brace of birds becomes a pair of pistols at the hands of the Void.
description.display: 逐枭唤起了古代贵族狩猎活动的历史。为了仪式，奥罗金精英培育出与其狩猎的猛禽相像之生物来重现文化传说。他们赐予「扎里曼号」船员逐枭和一对猛禽，作为接受船员们进入精英社会的标志。而这对猛禽在虚空的作用下变成了一对手枪。

description.canonical: Zariman colonists originally intended to use the Phenmor in burial rites. In Orokin society, the higher the rank, the greater number of volleys for the deceased. Its stock is carved from Phenaureus Pine, a tree designed to release seedlings only onto scorched earth. In the hands of the Void, the Phenmor becomes darkly aggressive.
description.display: 扎里曼殖民者们最初是希望在葬礼上使用凤殁的。在奥罗金的社会体系中，越高阶级的逝者葬礼上，人们为了纪念逝者射出的子弹数量就越多。这把武器的枪托由只在焦土上释放幼苗的樟子松雕刻而成。在与虚空的接触中，凤殁充满了阴暗的侵略性。

description.canonical: In the early Orokin Empire, elites wore Innodem as a symbolic reminder to defend the defenseless. The tradition fell out of style, but nostalgic elites acknowledged the sentiment in the form of a gift. The Void amplifies that ideal. Void energy strengthens Innodem gliding aerial attacks and the wielder is increasingly resilient as they perform finisher attacks in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 在早期的奥罗金帝国，精英们会佩戴清刚作为提醒他们保护手无寸铁者的象征。这种传统早已过时了，但念旧的精英们有时会以礼物的形式认可这种理念。而虚空则放大了这一理念，虚空能量增强了这把武器的滑翔制空攻击之力；当佩戴者在灵化形态下进行处决攻击时，会感受到这把武器增强的韧性。

description.canonical: The Thalys played a ceremonial role in the Zariman harvest festival, and was intended to reap the first fruits of Tau. Now twisted from this purpose, it plants Void shards in enemy flesh instead. Each new shard planted causes existing shards to inflict damage on their hosts.
description.display: 大力士曾在扎里曼收获节中扮演仪式性的角色，原本用来收获 Tau 星系的最初成果。而如今，它的用途已被扭曲，转而在敌人的肉体中播种虚空碎片。每种下一块新碎片，现有的碎片便会对宿主造成伤害。

description.canonical: Orokin elites admired farmers in conquered regions, because they had learned to fight with modified farming tools despite being forbidden to own weapons. For their voyage, the Zariman were presented with Praedos in recognition of Zariman tenacity. The Void reinforces the strength of the spirited individual by fortifying the Praedos.
description.display: 奥罗金精英很佩服那些被征服地区的农夫，他们在武器禁令的压制下学会了通过改良的农具来进行战斗。当「扎里曼号」启航时，船上的人们获得了双雄以表彰他们坚韧不拔的精神。虚空通过增强双雄的力量来奖励使用该武器的人。

description.canonical: During parades and victory marches, the Laetum fired pigmented airburst rounds that rained onto festive crowds. The Orokin sent Laetum with the Zariman so they could properly celebrate a successful maiden voyage to Tau. There would be no such celebration, but the Void imbued the Laetum with a much more explosive capacity.
description.display: 在阅兵式和得胜行军期间，人们会用奏凯发射色彩缤纷的空爆弹化作鲜艳的雨点落在欢庆的人群身上。奥罗金人将奏凯送上了「扎里曼号」，以便他们能够好好庆祝前往 Tau 星系的成功首航。虽然这样的庆祝活动从未发生，但虚空给奏凯赋予了更强的爆炸之力。

description.canonical: Albrecht's Void experiments revealed the true destructive potential of this fist weapon. In Incarnon form, perform Heavy Slams to impale nearby enemies with spikes.
description.display: 阿尔布雷希特的虚空实验揭示了这把拳套武器的真正破坏潜力。在灵化形态下，使用重型震地攻击会以尖刺刺穿附近的敌人。

description.canonical: Albrecht's Void experiments revealed the true destructive potential of this weapon. In Incarnon form, draw in ambient power to deal steadily increased damage to enemies. At full power, release a blast of Heat.
description.display: 阿尔布雷希特的虚空实验揭示了这把武器的真正破坏潜力。在灵化形态下，吸收周围的能量对敌人造成逐渐增加的伤害。当能量充满时，释放一股 火焰爆炸。

description.canonical: Wield the timeless power of this mighty hammer. Heavy Attacks performed with Ekhein temporarily increase its Damage and Attack Speed.
description.display: 掌控这把强大战锤的永恒力量。使用映声战锤进行的重击会暂时增加其伤害和攻击速度。

description.canonical: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. This large, weighty double-barreled pistol delivers twin projectiles that pack a punch, exploding on impact. Secondary fire puts the weapon in lock-on mode. Aim to lock onto multiple targets, then fire to unleash homing projectiles.
description.display: 一把由英择谛所设计的古老武器。主要射击可从目标身上吸取生命精华，以助燃次要射击带来的毁灭性攻击。这把大且沉的双管手枪可发出双股投射弹药，并在撞击时产生强力爆炸。次要射击会将手枪置于锁定状态，可追踪多个目标，并释放制导弹药。

description.canonical: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy, oversized automatic rifle with withering fire that delivers rapid heat damage. Secondary fire unleashes an arcing projectile that ricochets off surfaces and enemies, exploding on every impact.
description.display: 一把由英择谛所设计的古老武器。主要射击可从目标身上吸取生命精华，以助燃次要射击带来的毁灭性攻击。这把具有毁灭级火力的重型超大号自动步枪可迅速造成火焰伤害。次要射击可呈弧线抛射出一枚跳射弹丸，每次撞击到物体表面和敌人都会造成爆炸伤害。

description.canonical: Encased in plates refined from pure prisma crystals, this rare element gives this assault rifle a radiant luster.
description.display: 这把突击步枪镀上了一层纯净的棱晶，此种稀有元素赋予它闪耀动人的光泽。

description.canonical: Forged from raw prisma crystals and infused with Void energy, this blade's pristine edge is honed razor-sharp to eviscerate even the most deadly of foes.
description.display: 这把空刃是由原生棱晶所锻造而成，并注入了虚空能量，千锤百炼下其纯净的刀锋即便是最致命的敌人都能大卸八块。

description.canonical: For Orokin-era smugglers, this fearsome handheld shotgun was a favored tool for 'dispute resolution'.
description.display: 对于奥罗金时代的走私者来说，这把令人生畏的手持式霰弹枪是最受他们青睐用来"解决纠纷"的工具。

description.canonical: These talons emerge when Valkyr unleashes her Hysteria.
description.display: 这些利爪将于 Valkyr 解放她的狂化爆发力量时显现。

description.canonical: These talons emerge when Valkyr Prime unleashes Hysteria.
description.display: 当 Valkyr Prime 释放狂化爆发时这些爪子就会出现。

description.canonical: Atlas' deadly fists, as utilized by his Landslide Ability.
description.display: Atlas 的致命拳头，由他的「土石坍方」技能创造。

description.canonical: Atlas Prime's deadly fists, as utilized by his Landslide Ability.
description.display: Atlas Prime 的致命拳头，由他的「土石坍方」技能创造。

description.canonical: Unleash the power of the Jade Light.
description.display: 释放翠玉之光的力量。

description.canonical: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.
description.display: 召唤一把充斥着纯洁光亮和无限力量的剑。

description.canonical: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.
description.display: 召唤一把由纯粹的光与力量锻造而成的刀剑。

description.canonical: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.
description.display: 召唤一把充斥着纯洁光亮和无限力量的剑。

description.canonical: Take flight with Razorwing and summon these mighty dual pistols.
description.display: 通过剃刀之翼翱翔天际并召唤这对强劲的手枪。

description.canonical: Take flight with Razorwing and summon this formidable heavy blade.
description.display: 通过剃刀之翼翱翔天际并召唤这把强大的巨刃。

description.canonical: Take flight with Razorwing and summon these mighty dual pistols.
description.display: 通过剃刀之翼翱翔天际并召唤这对强劲的手枪。

description.canonical: Take flight with Razorwing and summon this formidable heavy blade.
description.display: 通过剃刀之翼翱翔天际并召唤这把强大的巨刃。

description.canonical: Cyte-09’s exalted Sniper Rifle. Bullets ricochet off Weak Points to seek out other nearby Weak Points. Alt fire lobs a grenade that completely freezes enemies with a Cold Status Effect, leaving a freezing zone that continues to apply Cold Status for a duration.
description.display: Cyte-09 的显赫狙击步枪。子弹从敌人的弱点弹射而出，寻找附近的其他敌人弱点。次要射击投掷的榴弹会以 冰冻异常状态完全冻结敌人，并在持续时间内留下一个持续施加 冰冻异常状态的冻结区域。

description.canonical: These nasty things come out when Garuda forgoes a melee weapon.
description.display: 当 Garuda 舍弃近战武器时，这些讨厌的东西便会出现。

description.canonical: These nasty things come out when Garuda Prime forgoes a melee weapon.
description.display: 当 Garuda Prime 舍弃近战武器时，这些凶恶的东西便会出现。

description.canonical: Gara's devastating Shattered Lash, created by her Shattered lash ability.
description.display: Gara 的琉璃碎击能造成毁灭性的打击，由她的「琉璃碎击」技能创造。

description.canonical: Gara Prime's devastating Shattered Lash Prime, created by her Shattered lash ability.
description.display: Gara Prime 的琉璃碎击 Prime 能造成毁灭性的打击，由她的「琉璃碎击」技能创造。

description.canonical: Charges up and releases bolts of Balefire.
description.display: 蓄力并放出闪电般的野火。

description.canonical: Charge and release powerful bolts of balefire.
description.display: 蓄力并放出闪电般的野火。

description.canonical: Khora's deadly exalted whip, unleased by her Whipclaw ability.
description.display: Khora 的致命显赫长鞭，由她的「长鞭利爪」技能召唤。

description.canonical: Khora Prime's deadly exalted whip, unleased by her Whipclaw ability.
description.display: Khora Prime 的致命显赫长鞭，由她的「长鞭利爪」技能召唤。

description.canonical: A unique staff wielded by the Wukong Warframe.
description.display: Wukong 所持有的独特长棍。

description.canonical: A unique staff wielded by the Wukong Prime Warframe.
description.display: Wukong Prime 所持有的独特长棍。

description.canonical: Ash's fearsome Shadow Clones, as projected by his Blade Storm ability.
description.display: Ash 的凶恶影分身，由他的「剑刃风暴」技能创造。

description.canonical: Ash Prime's fearsome Shadow Clones, as projected by his Blade Storm ability.
description.display: Ash Prime 的凶恶影分身，由他的「剑刃风暴」技能创造。

description.canonical: Baruuk channels the desert wind to turn his fists and feet into an exalted weapon.
description.display: Baruuk 把沙漠之风转移到他的双拳和脚掌，使之成为了一件显赫武器。

description.canonical: Baruuk Prime channels the Desert Wind to turn his fists and feet into an exalted prime weapon.
description.display: Baruuk Prime 把沙漠之风转移到他的双拳和脚掌，使之成为了一件显赫 Prime 武器。

description.canonical: Wield the power of Dante's chronicles. Customize Noctua with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Primary attack releases pages that tear into lethal pieces on hits. Its alternate attack releases a wave with infinite Punch Through.
description.display: 掌握 Dante 编年史的力量。为夜枭安装典籍 Mod 以增强战甲技能并获得战术优势。主要攻击释放的书页在命中后会碎裂成致命的碎片。次要攻击会释放具有无限穿透的攻击波。

description.canonical: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.
description.display: 召唤出一把强力长弓并发动毁灭性的集中箭矢射击。

description.canonical: These razor-sharp blades of condensed Void energy inflict deep and grievous wounds.
description.display: 这些凝聚虚空能量的锋利之刃能造成了深切而痛苦的伤口。

description.canonical: The claws of the shadowy helmsman have cast many foolish foes into the cold below.
description.display: 幽影舵手的利爪已将众多愚蠢的敌人投入幽寒深处。

description.canonical: A titanic blade modeled after some of the very oldest swords, this weapon was designed to slice through massed enemy troops in a single stroke.
description.display: 一把灵感源自最古老刀剑的巨大利刃，这把武器是为了一次性击穿大量敌人而设计的。

description.canonical: The pinnacle of Entrati weapons design: dual energy mortars that fire with such devastating power that the Necramech must first be locked into a braced, stationary turret mode.
description.display: 英择谛武器设计的巅峰之作：双能追击炮的毁灭威力之大，使得殁世机甲必须将自身锁定在稳定的炮塔模式下来使用该武器。

description.canonical: Teshin’s twin blades. Power Strike sends forth two arcs of energy that inflict Electricity Status.
description.display: Teshin 的双侍刃。使用强力攻击可发出两道造成 电击异常状态的爆炸性能量弧。

excludedWeapons.displayName: 伊克瓦纳 如杭 II
伊克瓦纳 II 如杭

description.canonical: Claim the power of Albrecht Entrati's knowledge. Customize the Grimoire with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Its alternate attack releases a voltaic orb with guaranteed Electricity Status.
description.display: 获取阿尔布雷希特·英择谛的全知之力。使用典籍 Mod 增强战甲技能并获得战术优势。次要射击发射一颗必定造成 电击异常状态的电弧球。

description.canonical: A warrior who prefers brute force will make the most of Sampotes. Power Strike slams Sampotes into the ground to damage enemies with a shockwave that inflicts Heat Status.
description.display: 喜欢蛮力的战士会充分利用三宝聚。使用强力攻击猛击地面，用产生的冲击波伤害敌人，并造成 火焰异常状态。

description.canonical: Edun befits dexterous warriors. Power Strike knocks down and blinds enemies by surrounding them with a cloud of dust.
description.display: 雷石祭适合于机敏的战士。使用强力攻击激起一团环绕敌人的尘雾，从而击倒并致盲他们。

description.canonical: Syam is at home in the hands of a focused warrior. Power Strike lifts enemies into the air and unleashes a flurry of deadly slashes.
description.display: 业珀在专注的战士手中物尽其用。使用强力攻击将敌人震飞至空中，并释放出一连串的致命斩击。

description.canonical: Azothane calls the visionary warrior to turn the tides of battle. Power Strike plunges Azothane into the ground to send forth five celestial blades that apply Cold Status and then explode.
description.display: 溶灵尊会召唤出有远见的战士来扭转战局。使用强力攻击将溶灵尊插入地面，召唤出五道短暂与漂泊者并肩作战的刃气，造成 冰冻异常状态，随即它们便会爆炸。

description.canonical: Argo & Vel bolster the warrior who stands fast. Block to activate its staggering energy shield. Power Strike stuns enemies and inflicts 切割Slash Status. Perfect Parry restores your Power Strike.
description.display: 星舟 & 帆为坚忍不拔的战士提供支持。格挡以激活其惊人的能量护盾。强力攻击会击晕敌人并造成 切割切割异常状态。完美招架可重置强力攻击的冷却时间。
